13using System;
14using System.Text;
15using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
16using System.Collections.Generic;
17
18#pragma warning disable CS1591
19namespace FMOD
20{
21 /*
22 FMOD version number. Check this against FMOD::System::getVersion / System_GetVersion
23 0xaaaabbcc -> aaaa = major version number. bb = minor version number. cc = development version number.
24 */
25 public partial class VERSION
26 {
27 public const int number = 0x00020311;
28
29 /*
30 Define FMOD_DEBUG or FMOD_LOGGING to select appropriate libraries
31 */
32#if FMOD_DEBUG
33 public const string suffix = "D";
34#elif FMOD_LOGGING || DEVELOPMENT_BUILD
35 public const string suffix = "L";
36#else
37 public const string suffix = "";
38#endif
39
40#if !UNITY_2021_3_OR_NEWER
41 public const string dll = "fmod" + suffix;
42#endif
43 }
44
45 public class CONSTANTS
46 {
47 public const int MAX_CHANNEL_WIDTH = 32;
48 public const int MAX_LISTENERS = 8;
49 public const int REVERB_MAXINSTANCES = 4;
50 public const int MAX_SYSTEMS = 8;
51 }

56 public enum RESULT : int
57 {
58 OK,
59 ERR_BADCOMMAND,
60 ERR_CHANNEL_ALLOC,
61 ERR_CHANNEL_STOLEN,
62 ERR_DMA,
63 ERR_DSP_CONNECTION,
64 ERR_DSP_DONTPROCESS,
65 ERR_DSP_FORMAT,
66 ERR_DSP_INUSE,
67 ERR_DSP_NOTFOUND,
68 ERR_DSP_RESERVED,
69 ERR_DSP_SILENCE,
70 ERR_DSP_TYPE,
71 ERR_FILE_BAD,
72 ERR_FILE_COULDNOTSEEK,
73 ERR_FILE_DISKEJECTED,
74 ERR_FILE_EOF,
75 ERR_FILE_ENDOFDATA,
76 ERR_FILE_NOTFOUND,
77 ERR_FORMAT,
78 ERR_HEADER_MISMATCH,
79 ERR_HTTP,
80 ERR_HTTP_ACCESS,
81 ERR_HTTP_PROXY_AUTH,
82 ERR_HTTP_SERVER_ERROR,
83 ERR_HTTP_TIMEOUT,
84 ERR_INITIALIZATION,
85 ERR_INITIALIZED,
86 ERR_INTERNAL,
87 ERR_INVALID_FLOAT,
88 ERR_INVALID_HANDLE,
89 ERR_INVALID_PARAM,
90 ERR_INVALID_POSITION,
91 ERR_INVALID_SPEAKER,
92 ERR_INVALID_SYNCPOINT,
93 ERR_INVALID_THREAD,
94 ERR_INVALID_VECTOR,
95 ERR_MAXAUDIBLE,
96 ERR_MEMORY,
97 ERR_MEMORY_CANTPOINT,
98 ERR_NEEDS3D,
99 ERR_NEEDSHARDWARE,
100 ERR_NET_CONNECT,
101 ERR_NET_SOCKET_ERROR,
102 ERR_NET_URL,
103 ERR_NET_WOULD_BLOCK,
104 ERR_NOTREADY,
105 ERR_OUTPUT_ALLOCATED,
106 ERR_OUTPUT_CREATEBUFFER,
107 ERR_OUTPUT_DRIVERCALL,
108 ERR_OUTPUT_FORMAT,
109 ERR_OUTPUT_INIT,
110 ERR_OUTPUT_NODRIVERS,
111 ERR_PLUGIN,
112 ERR_PLUGIN_MISSING,
113 ERR_PLUGIN_RESOURCE,
114 ERR_PLUGIN_VERSION,
115 ERR_RECORD,
116 ERR_REVERB_CHANNELGROUP,
117 ERR_REVERB_INSTANCE,
118 ERR_SUBSOUNDS,
119 ERR_SUBSOUND_ALLOCATED,
120 ERR_SUBSOUND_CANTMOVE,
121 ERR_TAGNOTFOUND,
122 ERR_TOOMANYCHANNELS,
123 ERR_TRUNCATED,
124 ERR_UNIMPLEMENTED,
125 ERR_UNINITIALIZED,

127 ERR_VERSION,

288 public enum SPEAKER : int
289 {
290 NONE = -1,
291 FRONT_LEFT,
292 FRONT_RIGHT,
293 FRONT_CENTER,
294 LOW_FREQUENCY,
295 SURROUND_LEFT,
296 SURROUND_RIGHT,

298 BACK_RIGHT,

307 [Flags]
308 public enum CHANNELMASK : uint
309 {
310 FRONT_LEFT = 0x00000001,
311 FRONT_RIGHT = 0x00000002,
312 FRONT_CENTER = 0x00000004,
313 LOW_FREQUENCY = 0x00000008,
314 SURROUND_LEFT = 0x00000010,
315 SURROUND_RIGHT = 0x00000020,
316 BACK_LEFT = 0x00000040,
317 BACK_RIGHT = 0x00000080,
318 BACK_CENTER = 0x00000100,
319
320 MONO = (FRONT_LEFT),
321 STEREO = (FRONT_LEFT | FRONT_RIGHT),
322 LRC = (FRONT_LEFT | FRONT_RIGHT | FRONT_CENTER),
323 QUAD = (FRONT_LEFT | FRONT_RIGHT | SURROUND_LEFT | SURROUND_RIGHT),
324 SURROUND = (FRONT_LEFT | FRONT_RIGHT | FRONT_CENTER | SURROUND_LEFT | SURROUND_RIGHT),
325 _5POINT1 = (FRONT_LEFT | FRONT_RIGHT | FRONT_CENTER | LOW_FREQUENCY | SURROUND_LEFT | SURROUND_RIGHT),
326 _5POINT1_REARS = (FRONT_LEFT | FRONT_RIGHT | FRONT_CENTER | LOW_FREQUENCY | BACK_LEFT | BACK_RIGHT),
327 _7POINT0 = (FRONT_LEFT | FRONT_RIGHT | FRONT_CENTER | SURROUND_LEFT | SURROUND_RIGHT | BACK_LEFT | BACK_RIGHT),
328 _7POINT1 = (FRONT_LEFT | FRONT_RIGHT | FRONT_CENTER | LOW_FREQUENCY | SURROUND_LEFT | SURROUND_RIGHT | BACK_LEFT | BACK_RIGHT)
329 }
330

529 [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
530 public struct CPU_USAGE
531 {
532 public float dsp; /* DSP mixing CPU usage. */
533 public float stream; /* Streaming engine CPU usage. */
534 public float geometry; /* Geometry engine CPU usage. */
535 public float update; /* System::update CPU usage. */
536 public float convolution1; /* Convolution reverb processing thread #1 CPU usage */
537 public float convolution2; /* Convolution reverb processing thread #2 CPU usage */
538 }

548 [Flags]
549 public enum SYSTEM_CALLBACK_TYPE : uint

552 DEVICELOST = 0x00000002,
553 MEMORYALLOCATIONFAILED = 0x00000004,
554 THREADCREATED = 0x00000008,
555 BADDSPCONNECTION = 0x00000010,
556 PREMIX = 0x00000020,
557 POSTMIX = 0x00000040,
558 ERROR = 0x00000080,
559 THREADDESTROYED = 0x00000100,
560 PREUPDATE = 0x00000200,
561 POSTUPDATE = 0x00000400,
562 RECORDLISTCHANGED = 0x00000800,
563 BUFFEREDNOMIX = 0x00001000,
564 DEVICEREINITIALIZE = 0x00002000,
565 OUTPUTUNDERRUN = 0x00004000,
566 RECORDPOSITIONCHANGED = 0x00008000,
567 ALL = 0xFFFFFFFF,
568 }

570 /*
571 FMOD Callbacks
572 */
573 public delegate RESULT DEBUG_CALLBACK(DEBUG_FLAGS flags, IntPtr file, int line, IntPtr func, IntPtr message);
574 public delegate RESULT SYSTEM_CALLBACK(IntPtr system, SYSTEM_CALLBACK_TYPE type, IntPtr commanddata1, IntPtr commanddata2, IntPtr userdata);
575 public delegate RESULT CHANNELCONTROL_CALLBACK(IntPtr channelcontrol, CHANNELCONTROL_TYPE controltype, CHANNELCONTROL_CALLBACK_TYPE callbacktype, IntPtr commanddata1, IntPtr commanddata2);
576 public delegate RESULT DSP_CALLBACK(IntPtr dsp, DSP_CALLBACK_TYPE type, IntPtr data);
577 public delegate RESULT SOUND_NONBLOCK_CALLBACK(IntPtr sound, RESULT result);
578 public delegate RESULT SOUND_PCMREAD_CALLBACK(IntPtr sound, IntPtr data, uint datalen);
579 public delegate RESULT SOUND_PCMSETPOS_CALLBACK(IntPtr sound, int subsound, uint position, TIMEUNIT postype);
580 public delegate RESULT FILE_OPEN_CALLBACK(IntPtr name, ref uint filesize, ref IntPtr handle, IntPtr userdata);
581 public delegate RESULT FILE_CLOSE_CALLBACK(IntPtr handle, IntPtr userdata);
582 public delegate RESULT FILE_READ_CALLBACK(IntPtr handle, IntPtr buffer, uint sizebytes, ref uint bytesread, IntPtr userdata);
583 public delegate RESULT FILE_SEEK_CALLBACK(IntPtr handle, uint pos, IntPtr userdata);
584 public delegate RESULT FILE_ASYNCREAD_CALLBACK(IntPtr info, IntPtr userdata);
585 public delegate RESULT FILE_ASYNCCANCEL_CALLBACK(IntPtr info, IntPtr userdata);
586 public delegate void FILE_ASYNCDONE_FUNC(IntPtr info, RESULT result);
587 public delegate IntPtr MEMORY_ALLOC_CALLBACK(uint size, MEMORY_TYPE type, IntPtr sourcestr);
588 public delegate IntPtr MEMORY_REALLOC_CALLBACK(IntPtr ptr, uint size, MEMORY_TYPE type, IntPtr sourcestr);
589 public delegate void MEMORY_FREE_CALLBACK(IntPtr ptr, MEMORY_TYPE type, IntPtr sourcestr);
590 public delegate float CB_3D_ROLLOFF_CALLBACK(IntPtr channelcontrol, float distance);
591

680 [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
681 public struct CREATESOUNDEXINFO
682 {

684 public uint length;
685 public uint fileoffset;
686 public int numchannels;
687 public int defaultfrequency;

689 public uint decodebuffersize;
690 public int initialsubsound;
691 public int numsubsounds;

693 public int inclusionlistnum;
694 public IntPtr pcmreadcallback_internal;
695 public IntPtr pcmsetposcallback_internal;
696 public IntPtr nonblockcallback_internal;
697 public IntPtr dlsname;
698 public IntPtr encryptionkey;
699 public int maxpolyphony;
700 public IntPtr userdata;
701 public SOUND_TYPE suggestedsoundtype;
702 public IntPtr fileuseropen_internal;
703 public IntPtr fileuserclose_internal;
704 public IntPtr fileuserread_internal;
705 public IntPtr fileuserseek_internal;
706 public IntPtr fileuserasyncread_internal;
707 public IntPtr fileuserasynccancel_internal;
708 public IntPtr fileuserdata;
709 public int filebuffersize;
710 public CHANNELORDER channelorder;
711 public IntPtr initialsoundgroup;
712 public uint initialseekposition;
713 public TIMEUNIT initialseekpostype;
714 public int ignoresetfilesystem;
715 public uint audioqueuepolicy;
716 public uint minmidigranularity;
717 public int nonblockthreadid;
718 public IntPtr fsbguid;
719
720 public SOUND_PCMREAD_CALLBACK pcmreadcallback
721 {
722 set { pcmreadcallback_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
723 get { return pcmreadcallback_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<SOUND_PCMREAD_CALLBACK>(pcmreadcallback_internal); }
724 }
725 public SOUND_PCMSETPOS_CALLBACK pcmsetposcallback
726 {
727 set { pcmsetposcallback_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
728 get { return pcmsetposcallback_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<SOUND_PCMSETPOS_CALLBACK>(pcmsetposcallback_internal); }
729 }
730 public SOUND_NONBLOCK_CALLBACK nonblockcallback
731 {
732 set { nonblockcallback_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
733 get { return nonblockcallback_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<SOUND_NONBLOCK_CALLBACK>(nonblockcallback_internal); }
734 }
735 public FILE_OPEN_CALLBACK fileuseropen
736 {
737 set { fileuseropen_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
738 get { return fileuseropen_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<FILE_OPEN_CALLBACK>(fileuseropen_internal); }
739 }
740 public FILE_CLOSE_CALLBACK fileuserclose
741 {
742 set { fileuserclose_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
743 get { return fileuserclose_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<FILE_CLOSE_CALLBACK>(fileuserclose_internal); }
744 }
745 public FILE_READ_CALLBACK fileuserread
746 {
747 set { fileuserread_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
748 get { return fileuserread_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<FILE_READ_CALLBACK>(fileuserread_internal); }
749 }
750 public FILE_SEEK_CALLBACK fileuserseek
751 {
752 set { fileuserseek_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
753 get { return fileuserseek_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<FILE_SEEK_CALLBACK>(fileuserseek_internal); }
754 }
755 public FILE_ASYNCREAD_CALLBACK fileuserasyncread
756 {
757 set { fileuserasyncread_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
758 get { return fileuserasyncread_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<FILE_ASYNCREAD_CALLBACK>(fileuserasyncread_internal); }
759 }
760 public FILE_ASYNCCANCEL_CALLBACK fileuserasynccancel
761 {
762 set { fileuserasynccancel_internal = (value == null ? IntPtr.Zero : Marshal.GetFunctionPointerForDelegate(value)); }
763 get { return fileuserasynccancel_internal == IntPtr.Zero ? null : Marshal.GetDelegateForFunctionPointer<FILE_ASYNCCANCEL_CALLBACK>(fileuserasynccancel_internal); }
764 }
765
766 }

768#pragma warning disable 414
769 [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
770 public struct REVERB_PROPERTIES
771 {
772 public float DecayTime;
773 public float EarlyDelay;
774 public float LateDelay;
775 public float HFReference;
776 public float HFDecayRatio;
777 public float Diffusion;
778 public float Density;
779 public float LowShelfFrequency;
780 public float LowShelfGain;
781 public float HighCut;
782 public float EarlyLateMix;
783 public float WetLevel;
784
785 #region wrapperinternal
786 public REVERB_PROPERTIES(float decayTime, float earlyDelay, float lateDelay, float hfReference,
787 float hfDecayRatio, float diffusion, float density, float lowShelfFrequency, float lowShelfGain,
788 float highCut, float earlyLateMix, float wetLevel)
789 {
790 DecayTime = decayTime;
791 EarlyDelay = earlyDelay;
792 LateDelay = lateDelay;
793 HFReference = hfReference;
794 HFDecayRatio = hfDecayRatio;
795 Diffusion = diffusion;
796 Density = density;
797 LowShelfFrequency = lowShelfFrequency;
798 LowShelfGain = lowShelfGain;
799 HighCut = highCut;
800 EarlyLateMix = earlyLateMix;
801 WetLevel = wetLevel;
802 }
803 #endregion
804 }
805#pragma warning restore 414
806
807 public class PRESET
808 {
809 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES OFF() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1000, 7, 11, 5000, 100, 100, 100, 250, 0, 20, 96, -80.0f); }
810 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES GENERIC() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 7, 11, 5000, 83, 100, 100, 250, 0, 14500, 96, -8.0f); }
811 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES PADDEDCELL() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(170, 1, 2, 5000, 10, 100, 100, 250, 0, 160, 84, -7.8f); }
812 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES ROOM() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(400, 2, 3, 5000, 83, 100, 100, 250, 0, 6050, 88, -9.4f); }
813 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES BATHROOM() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 7, 11, 5000, 54, 100, 60, 250, 0, 2900, 83, 0.5f); }
814 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES LIVINGROOM() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(500, 3, 4, 5000, 10, 100, 100, 250, 0, 160, 58, -19.0f); }
815 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES STONEROOM() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(2300, 12, 17, 5000, 64, 100, 100, 250, 0, 7800, 71, -8.5f); }
816 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES AUDITORIUM() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(4300, 20, 30, 5000, 59, 100, 100, 250, 0, 5850, 64, -11.7f); }
817 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES CONCERTHALL() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(3900, 20, 29, 5000, 70, 100, 100, 250, 0, 5650, 80, -9.8f); }
818 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES CAVE() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(2900, 15, 22, 5000, 100, 100, 100, 250, 0, 20000, 59, -11.3f); }
819 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES ARENA() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(7200, 20, 30, 5000, 33, 100, 100, 250, 0, 4500, 80, -9.6f); }
820 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES HANGAR() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(10000, 20, 30, 5000, 23, 100, 100, 250, 0, 3400, 72, -7.4f); }
821 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES CARPETTEDHALLWAY() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(300, 2, 30, 5000, 10, 100, 100, 250, 0, 500, 56, -24.0f); }
822 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES HALLWAY() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 7, 11, 5000, 59, 100, 100, 250, 0, 7800, 87, -5.5f); }
823 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES STONECORRIDOR() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(270, 13, 20, 5000, 79, 100, 100, 250, 0, 9000, 86, -6.0f); }
824 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES ALLEY() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 7, 11, 5000, 86, 100, 100, 250, 0, 8300, 80, -9.8f); }
825 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES FOREST() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 162, 88, 5000, 54, 79, 100, 250, 0, 760, 94, -12.3f); }
826 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES CITY() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 7, 11, 5000, 67, 50, 100, 250, 0, 4050, 66, -26.0f); }
827 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES MOUNTAINS() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 300, 100, 5000, 21, 27, 100, 250, 0, 1220, 82, -24.0f); }
828 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES QUARRY() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 61, 25, 5000, 83, 100, 100, 250, 0, 3400, 100, -5.0f); }
829 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES PLAIN() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 179, 100, 5000, 50, 21, 100, 250, 0, 1670, 65, -28.0f); }
830 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES PARKINGLOT() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1700, 8, 12, 5000, 100, 100, 100, 250, 0, 20000, 56, -19.5f); }
831 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES SEWERPIPE() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(2800, 14, 21, 5000, 14, 80, 60, 250, 0, 3400, 66, 1.2f); }
832 public static REVERB_PROPERTIES UNDERWATER() { return new REVERB_PROPERTIES(1500, 7, 11, 5000, 10, 100, 100, 250, 0, 500, 92, 7.0f); }
833 }
834
835 [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
836 public struct ADVANCEDSETTINGS
837 {
838 public int cbSize;
839 public int maxMPEGCodecs;
840 public int maxADPCMCodecs;
841 public int maxXMACodecs;
842 public int maxVorbisCodecs;
843 public int maxAT9Codecs;
844 public int maxFADPCMCodecs;
845 public int maxOpusCodecs;
846 public int ASIONumChannels;
847 public IntPtr ASIOChannelList;
848 public IntPtr ASIOSpeakerList;
849 public float vol0virtualvol;
850 public uint defaultDecodeBufferSize;
851 public ushort profilePort;
852 public uint geometryMaxFadeTime;
853 public float distanceFilterCenterFreq;
854 public int reverb3Dinstance;
855 public int DSPBufferPoolSize;
856 public DSP_RESAMPLER resamplerMethod;
857 public uint randomSeed;
858 public int maxConvolutionThreads;
859 public int maxSpatialObjects;
860 }
861
862 [Flags]
863 public enum DRIVER_STATE : uint
864 {
865 CONNECTED = 0x00000001,
866 DEFAULT = 0x00000002,
867 }
868
869 public enum THREAD_PRIORITY : int
870 {
871 /* Platform specific priority range */
872 PLATFORM_MIN = -32 * 1024,
873 PLATFORM_MAX = 32 * 1024,
874
875 /* Platform agnostic priorities, maps internally to platform specific value */
876 DEFAULT = PLATFORM_MIN - 1,
877 LOW = PLATFORM_MIN - 2,
878 MEDIUM = PLATFORM_MIN - 3,
879 HIGH = PLATFORM_MIN - 4,
880 VERY_HIGH = PLATFORM_MIN - 5,
881 EXTREME = PLATFORM_MIN - 6,
882 CRITICAL = PLATFORM_MIN - 7,
883
884 /* Thread defaults */
885 MIXER = EXTREME,
886 FEEDER = CRITICAL,
887 STREAM = VERY_HIGH,
888 FILE = HIGH,
889 NONBLOCKING = HIGH,
890 RECORD = HIGH,
891 GEOMETRY = LOW,
892 PROFILER = MEDIUM,
893 STUDIO_UPDATE = MEDIUM,
894 STUDIO_LOAD_BANK = MEDIUM,
895 STUDIO_LOAD_SAMPLE = MEDIUM,
896 CONVOLUTION1 = VERY_HIGH,
897 CONVOLUTION2 = VERY_HIGH
898
899 }
900
901 public enum THREAD_STACK_SIZE : uint
902 {
903 DEFAULT = 0,
904 MIXER = 80 * 1024,
905 FEEDER = 16 * 1024,
906 STREAM = 96 * 1024,
907 FILE = 64 * 1024,
908 NONBLOCKING = 112 * 1024,
909 RECORD = 16 * 1024,
910 GEOMETRY = 48 * 1024,
911 PROFILER = 128 * 1024,
912 STUDIO_UPDATE = 96 * 1024,
913 STUDIO_LOAD_BANK = 96 * 1024,
914 STUDIO_LOAD_SAMPLE = 96 * 1024,
915 CONVOLUTION1 = 16 * 1024,
916 CONVOLUTION2 = 16 * 1024
917 }
918
919 [Flags]
920 public enum THREAD_AFFINITY : long
921 {
922 /* Platform agnostic thread groupings */
923 GROUP_DEFAULT = 0x4000000000000000,
924 GROUP_A = 0x4000000000000001,
925 GROUP_B = 0x4000000000000002,
926 GROUP_C = 0x4000000000000003,
927
928 /* Thread defaults */
929 MIXER = GROUP_A,
930 FEEDER = GROUP_C,
931 STREAM = GROUP_C,
932 FILE = GROUP_C,
933 NONBLOCKING = GROUP_C,
934 RECORD = GROUP_C,
935 GEOMETRY = GROUP_C,
936 PROFILER = GROUP_C,
937 STUDIO_UPDATE = GROUP_B,
938 STUDIO_LOAD_BANK = GROUP_C,
939 STUDIO_LOAD_SAMPLE = GROUP_C,
940 CONVOLUTION1 = GROUP_C,
941 CONVOLUTION2 = GROUP_C,
942
943 /* Core mask, valid up to 1 << 61 */
944 CORE_ALL = 0,
945 CORE_0 = 1 << 0,
946 CORE_1 = 1 << 1,
947 CORE_2 = 1 << 2,
948 CORE_3 = 1 << 3,
949 CORE_4 = 1 << 4,
950 CORE_5 = 1 << 5,
951 CORE_6 = 1 << 6,
952 CORE_7 = 1 << 7,
953 CORE_8 = 1 << 8,
954 CORE_9 = 1 << 9,
955 CORE_10 = 1 << 10,
956 CORE_11 = 1 << 11,
957 CORE_12 = 1 << 12,
958 CORE_13 = 1 << 13,
959 CORE_14 = 1 << 14,
960 CORE_15 = 1 << 15
961 }
962
963 public enum THREAD_TYPE : int
964 {
965 MIXER,
966 FEEDER,
967 STREAM,
968 FILE,
969 NONBLOCKING,
970 RECORD,
971 GEOMETRY,
972 PROFILER,
973 STUDIO_UPDATE,
974 STUDIO_LOAD_BANK,
975 STUDIO_LOAD_SAMPLE,
976 CONVOLUTION1,
977 CONVOLUTION2,
978
979 MAX
980 }
981
982 /*
983 FMOD System factory functions. Use this to create an FMOD System Instance. below you will see System init/close to get started.
984 */
985 public struct Factory
986 {
987 public static RESULT System_Create(out System system)
988 {
989 return FMOD5_System_Create(out system.handle, VERSION.number);
990 }
991
992 #region importfunctions
993 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
994 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_System_Create(out IntPtr system, uint headerversion);
995
996 #endregion
997 }
998
999 /*
1000 FMOD global system functions (optional).
1001 */
1002 public struct Memory
1003 {
1004 public static RESULT Initialize(IntPtr poolmem, int poollen, MEMORY_ALLOC_CALLBACK useralloc, MEMORY_REALLOC_CALLBACK userrealloc, MEMORY_FREE_CALLBACK userfree, MEMORY_TYPE memtypeflags = MEMORY_TYPE.ALL)
1005 {
1006 return FMOD5_Memory_Initialize(poolmem, poollen, useralloc, userrealloc, userfree, memtypeflags);
1007 }
1008
1009 public static RESULT GetStats(out int currentalloced, out int maxalloced, bool blocking = true)
1010 {
1011 return FMOD5_Memory_GetStats(out currentalloced, out maxalloced, blocking);
1012 }
1013
1014 #region importfunctions
1015 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1016 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Memory_Initialize(IntPtr poolmem, int poollen, MEMORY_ALLOC_CALLBACK useralloc, MEMORY_REALLOC_CALLBACK userrealloc, MEMORY_FREE_CALLBACK userfree, MEMORY_TYPE memtypeflags);
1017 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1018 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Memory_GetStats(out int currentalloced, out int maxalloced, bool blocking);
1019
1020 #endregion
1021 }
1022
1023 public struct Debug
1024 {
1025 public static RESULT Initialize(DEBUG_FLAGS flags, DEBUG_MODE mode = DEBUG_MODE.TTY, DEBUG_CALLBACK callback = null, string filename = null)
1026 {
1027 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1028 {
1029 return FMOD5_Debug_Initialize(flags, mode, callback, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(filename));
1030 }
1031 }
1032
1033 #region importfunctions
1034 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1035 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Debug_Initialize(DEBUG_FLAGS flags, DEBUG_MODE mode, DEBUG_CALLBACK callback, byte[] filename);
1036
1037 #endregion
1038 }
1039
1040 public struct Thread
1041 {
1042 public static RESULT SetAttributes(THREAD_TYPE type, THREAD_AFFINITY affinity = THREAD_AFFINITY.GROUP_DEFAULT, THREAD_PRIORITY priority = THREAD_PRIORITY.DEFAULT, THREAD_STACK_SIZE stacksize = THREAD_STACK_SIZE.DEFAULT)
1043 {
1044 return FMOD5_Thread_SetAttributes(type, affinity, priority, stacksize);
1045 }
1046
1047 #region importfunctions
1048 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1049 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Thread_SetAttributes(THREAD_TYPE type, THREAD_AFFINITY affinity, THREAD_PRIORITY priority, THREAD_STACK_SIZE stacksize);
1050 #endregion
1051 }
1052
1053 /*
1054 'System' API.
1055 */
1056 public struct System
1057 {
1058 public RESULT release()
1059 {
1060 return FMOD5_System_Release(this.handle);
1061 }
1062
1063 // Setup functions.
1064 public RESULT setOutput(OUTPUTTYPE output)
1065 {
1066 return FMOD5_System_SetOutput(this.handle, output);
1067 }
1068 public RESULT getOutput(out OUTPUTTYPE output)
1069 {
1070 return FMOD5_System_GetOutput(this.handle, out output);
1071 }
1072 public RESULT getNumDrivers(out int numdrivers)
1073 {
1074 return FMOD5_System_GetNumDrivers(this.handle, out numdrivers);
1075 }
1076 public RESULT getDriverInfo(int id, out string name, int namelen, out Guid guid, out int systemrate, out SPEAKERMODE speakermode, out int speakermodechannels)
1077 {
1078 IntPtr stringMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(namelen);
1079
1080 RESULT result = FMOD5_System_GetDriverInfo(this.handle, id, stringMem, namelen, out guid, out systemrate, out speakermode, out speakermodechannels);
1081 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoding = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1082 {
1083 name = encoding.stringFromNative(stringMem);
1084 }
1085 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(stringMem);
1086
1087 return result;
1088 }
1089 public RESULT getDriverInfo(int id, out Guid guid, out int systemrate, out SPEAKERMODE speakermode, out int speakermodechannels)
1090 {
1091 return FMOD5_System_GetDriverInfo(this.handle, id, IntPtr.Zero, 0, out guid, out systemrate, out speakermode, out speakermodechannels);
1092 }
1093 public RESULT setDriver(int driver)
1094 {
1095 return FMOD5_System_SetDriver(this.handle, driver);
1096 }
1097 public RESULT getDriver(out int driver)
1098 {
1099 return FMOD5_System_GetDriver(this.handle, out driver);
1100 }
1101 public RESULT setSoftwareChannels(int numsoftwarechannels)
1102 {
1103 return FMOD5_System_SetSoftwareChannels(this.handle, numsoftwarechannels);
1104 }
1105 public RESULT getSoftwareChannels(out int numsoftwarechannels)
1106 {
1107 return FMOD5_System_GetSoftwareChannels(this.handle, out numsoftwarechannels);
1108 }
1109 public RESULT setSoftwareFormat(int samplerate, SPEAKERMODE speakermode, int numrawspeakers)
1110 {
1111 return FMOD5_System_SetSoftwareFormat(this.handle, samplerate, speakermode, numrawspeakers);
1112 }
1113 public RESULT getSoftwareFormat(out int samplerate, out SPEAKERMODE speakermode, out int numrawspeakers)
1114 {
1115 return FMOD5_System_GetSoftwareFormat(this.handle, out samplerate, out speakermode, out numrawspeakers);
1116 }
1117 public RESULT setDSPBufferSize(uint bufferlength, int numbuffers)
1118 {
1119 return FMOD5_System_SetDSPBufferSize(this.handle, bufferlength, numbuffers);
1120 }
1121 public RESULT getDSPBufferSize(out uint bufferlength, out int numbuffers)
1122 {
1123 return FMOD5_System_GetDSPBufferSize(this.handle, out bufferlength, out numbuffers);
1124 }
1125 public RESULT setFileSystem(FILE_OPEN_CALLBACK useropen, FILE_CLOSE_CALLBACK userclose, FILE_READ_CALLBACK userread, FILE_SEEK_CALLBACK userseek, FILE_ASYNCREAD_CALLBACK userasyncread, FILE_ASYNCCANCEL_CALLBACK userasynccancel, int blockalign)
1126 {
1127 return FMOD5_System_SetFileSystem(this.handle, useropen, userclose, userread, userseek, userasyncread, userasynccancel, blockalign);
1128 }
1129 public RESULT attachFileSystem(FILE_OPEN_CALLBACK useropen, FILE_CLOSE_CALLBACK userclose, FILE_READ_CALLBACK userread, FILE_SEEK_CALLBACK userseek)
1130 {
1131 return FMOD5_System_AttachFileSystem(this.handle, useropen, userclose, userread, userseek);
1132 }
1133 public RESULT setAdvancedSettings(ref ADVANCEDSETTINGS settings)
1134 {
1135 settings.cbSize = Marshal.SizeOf<ADVANCEDSETTINGS>();
1136 return FMOD5_System_SetAdvancedSettings(this.handle, ref settings);
1137 }
1138 public RESULT getAdvancedSettings(ref ADVANCEDSETTINGS settings)
1139 {
1140 settings.cbSize = Marshal.SizeOf<ADVANCEDSETTINGS>();
1141 return FMOD5_System_GetAdvancedSettings(this.handle, ref settings);
1142 }
1143 public RESULT setCallback(SYSTEM_CALLBACK callback, SYSTEM_CALLBACK_TYPE callbackmask = SYSTEM_CALLBACK_TYPE.ALL)
1144 {
1145 return FMOD5_System_SetCallback(this.handle, callback, callbackmask);
1146 }
1147
1148 // Plug-in support.
1149 public RESULT setPluginPath(string path)
1150 {
1151 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1152 {
1153 return FMOD5_System_SetPluginPath(this.handle, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(path));
1154 }
1155 }
1156 public RESULT loadPlugin(string filename, out uint handle, uint priority = 0)
1157 {
1158 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1159 {
1160 return FMOD5_System_LoadPlugin(this.handle, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(filename), out handle, priority);
1161 }
1162 }
1163 public RESULT unloadPlugin(uint handle)
1164 {
1165 return FMOD5_System_UnloadPlugin(this.handle, handle);
1166 }
1167 public RESULT getNumNestedPlugins(uint handle, out int count)
1168 {
1169 return FMOD5_System_GetNumNestedPlugins(this.handle, handle, out count);
1170 }
1171 public RESULT getNestedPlugin(uint handle, int index, out uint nestedhandle)
1172 {
1173 return FMOD5_System_GetNestedPlugin(this.handle, handle, index, out nestedhandle);
1174 }
1175 public RESULT getNumPlugins(PLUGINTYPE plugintype, out int numplugins)
1176 {
1177 return FMOD5_System_GetNumPlugins(this.handle, plugintype, out numplugins);
1178 }
1179 public RESULT getPluginHandle(PLUGINTYPE plugintype, int index, out uint handle)
1180 {
1181 return FMOD5_System_GetPluginHandle(this.handle, plugintype, index, out handle);
1182 }
1183 public RESULT getPluginInfo(uint handle, out PLUGINTYPE plugintype, out string name, int namelen, out uint version)
1184 {
1185 IntPtr stringMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(namelen);
1186
1187 RESULT result = FMOD5_System_GetPluginInfo(this.handle, handle, out plugintype, stringMem, namelen, out version);
1188 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1189 {
1190 name = encoder.stringFromNative(stringMem);
1191 }
1192 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(stringMem);
1193
1194 return result;
1195 }
1196 public RESULT getPluginInfo(uint handle, out PLUGINTYPE plugintype, out uint version)
1197 {
1198 return FMOD5_System_GetPluginInfo(this.handle, handle, out plugintype, IntPtr.Zero, 0, out version);
1199 }
1200 public RESULT setOutputByPlugin(uint handle)
1201 {
1202 return FMOD5_System_SetOutputByPlugin(this.handle, handle);
1203 }
1204 public RESULT getOutputByPlugin(out uint handle)
1205 {
1206 return FMOD5_System_GetOutputByPlugin(this.handle, out handle);
1207 }
1208 public RESULT createDSPByPlugin(uint handle, out DSP dsp)
1209 {
1210 return FMOD5_System_CreateDSPByPlugin(this.handle, handle, out dsp.handle);
1211 }
1212 public RESULT getDSPInfoByPlugin(uint handle, out IntPtr description)
1213 {
1214 return FMOD5_System_GetDSPInfoByPlugin(this.handle, handle, out description);
1215 }
1216 public RESULT registerDSP(ref DSP_DESCRIPTION description, out uint handle)
1217 {
1218 return FMOD5_System_RegisterDSP(this.handle, ref description, out handle);
1219 }
1220
1221 // Init/Close.
1222 public RESULT init(int maxchannels, INITFLAGS flags, IntPtr extradriverdata)
1223 {
1224 return FMOD5_System_Init(this.handle, maxchannels, flags, extradriverdata);
1225 }
1226 public RESULT close()
1227 {
1228 return FMOD5_System_Close(this.handle);
1229 }
1230
1231 // General post-init system functions.
1232 public RESULT update()
1233 {
1234 return FMOD5_System_Update(this.handle);
1235 }
1236 public RESULT setSpeakerPosition(SPEAKER speaker, float x, float y, bool active)
1237 {
1238 return FMOD5_System_SetSpeakerPosition(this.handle, speaker, x, y, active);
1239 }
1240 public RESULT getSpeakerPosition(SPEAKER speaker, out float x, out float y, out bool active)
1241 {
1242 return FMOD5_System_GetSpeakerPosition(this.handle, speaker, out x, out y, out active);
1243 }
1244 public RESULT setStreamBufferSize(uint filebuffersize, TIMEUNIT filebuffersizetype)
1245 {
1246 return FMOD5_System_SetStreamBufferSize(this.handle, filebuffersize, filebuffersizetype);
1247 }
1248 public RESULT getStreamBufferSize(out uint filebuffersize, out TIMEUNIT filebuffersizetype)
1249 {
1250 return FMOD5_System_GetStreamBufferSize(this.handle, out filebuffersize, out filebuffersizetype);
1251 }
1252 public RESULT set3DSettings(float dopplerscale, float distancefactor, float rolloffscale)
1253 {
1254 return FMOD5_System_Set3DSettings(this.handle, dopplerscale, distancefactor, rolloffscale);
1255 }
1256 public RESULT get3DSettings(out float dopplerscale, out float distancefactor, out float rolloffscale)
1257 {
1258 return FMOD5_System_Get3DSettings(this.handle, out dopplerscale, out distancefactor, out rolloffscale);
1259 }
1260 public RESULT set3DNumListeners(int numlisteners)
1261 {
1262 return FMOD5_System_Set3DNumListeners(this.handle, numlisteners);
1263 }
1264 public RESULT get3DNumListeners(out int numlisteners)
1265 {
1266 return FMOD5_System_Get3DNumListeners(this.handle, out numlisteners);
1267 }
1268 public RESULT set3DListenerAttributes(int listener, ref VECTOR pos, ref VECTOR vel, ref VECTOR forward, ref VECTOR up)
1269 {
1270 return FMOD5_System_Set3DListenerAttributes(this.handle, listener, ref pos, ref vel, ref forward, ref up);
1271 }
1272 public RESULT get3DListenerAttributes(int listener, out VECTOR pos, out VECTOR vel, out VECTOR forward, out VECTOR up)
1273 {
1274 return FMOD5_System_Get3DListenerAttributes(this.handle, listener, out pos, out vel, out forward, out up);
1275 }
1276 public RESULT set3DRolloffCallback(CB_3D_ROLLOFF_CALLBACK callback)
1277 {
1278 return FMOD5_System_Set3DRolloffCallback(this.handle, callback);
1279 }
1280 public RESULT mixerSuspend()
1281 {
1282 return FMOD5_System_MixerSuspend(this.handle);
1283 }
1284 public RESULT mixerResume()
1285 {
1286 return FMOD5_System_MixerResume(this.handle);
1287 }
1288 public RESULT getDefaultMixMatrix(SPEAKERMODE sourcespeakermode, SPEAKERMODE targetspeakermode, float[] matrix, int matrixhop)
1289 {
1290 return FMOD5_System_GetDefaultMixMatrix(this.handle, sourcespeakermode, targetspeakermode, matrix, matrixhop);
1291 }
1292 public RESULT getSpeakerModeChannels(SPEAKERMODE mode, out int channels)
1293 {
1294 return FMOD5_System_GetSpeakerModeChannels(this.handle, mode, out channels);
1295 }
1296
1297 // System information functions.
1298 public RESULT getVersion(out uint version)
1299 {
1300 uint buildnumber;
1301 return getVersion(out version, out buildnumber);
1302 }
1303 public RESULT getVersion(out uint version, out uint buildnumber)
1304 {
1305 return FMOD5_System_GetVersion(this.handle, out version, out buildnumber);
1306 }
1307 public RESULT getOutputHandle(out IntPtr handle)
1308 {
1309 return FMOD5_System_GetOutputHandle(this.handle, out handle);
1310 }
1311 public RESULT getChannelsPlaying(out int channels)
1312 {
1313 return FMOD5_System_GetChannelsPlaying(this.handle, out channels, IntPtr.Zero);
1314 }
1315 public RESULT getChannelsPlaying(out int channels, out int realchannels)
1316 {
1317 return FMOD5_System_GetChannelsPlaying(this.handle, out channels, out realchannels);
1318 }
1319 public RESULT getCPUUsage(out CPU_USAGE usage)
1320 {
1321 return FMOD5_System_GetCPUUsage(this.handle, out usage);
1322 }
1323 public RESULT getFileUsage(out Int64 sampleBytesRead, out Int64 streamBytesRead, out Int64 otherBytesRead)
1324 {
1325 return FMOD5_System_GetFileUsage(this.handle, out sampleBytesRead, out streamBytesRead, out otherBytesRead);
1326 }
1327
1328 // Sound/DSP/Channel/FX creation and retrieval.
1329 public RESULT createSound(string name, MODE mode, ref CREATESOUNDEXINFO exinfo, out Sound sound)
1330 {
1331 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1332 {
1333 return FMOD5_System_CreateSound(this.handle, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(name), mode, ref exinfo, out sound.handle);
1334 }
1335 }
1336 public RESULT createSound(byte[] data, MODE mode, ref CREATESOUNDEXINFO exinfo, out Sound sound)
1337 {
1338 return FMOD5_System_CreateSound(this.handle, data, mode, ref exinfo, out sound.handle);
1339 }
1340 public RESULT createSound(IntPtr name_or_data, MODE mode, ref CREATESOUNDEXINFO exinfo, out Sound sound)
1341 {
1342 return FMOD5_System_CreateSound(this.handle, name_or_data, mode, ref exinfo, out sound.handle);
1343 }
1344 public RESULT createSound(string name, MODE mode, out Sound sound)
1345 {
1346 CREATESOUNDEXINFO exinfo = new CREATESOUNDEXINFO();
1347 exinfo.cbsize = Marshal.SizeOf<CREATESOUNDEXINFO>();
1348
1349 return createSound(name, mode, ref exinfo, out sound);
1350 }
1351 public RESULT createStream(string name, MODE mode, ref CREATESOUNDEXINFO exinfo, out Sound sound)
1352 {
1353 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1354 {
1355 return FMOD5_System_CreateStream(this.handle, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(name), mode, ref exinfo, out sound.handle);
1356 }
1357 }
1358 public RESULT createStream(byte[] data, MODE mode, ref CREATESOUNDEXINFO exinfo, out Sound sound)
1359 {
1360 return FMOD5_System_CreateStream(this.handle, data, mode, ref exinfo, out sound.handle);
1361 }
1362 public RESULT createStream(IntPtr name_or_data, MODE mode, ref CREATESOUNDEXINFO exinfo, out Sound sound)
1363 {
1364 return FMOD5_System_CreateStream(this.handle, name_or_data, mode, ref exinfo, out sound.handle);
1365 }
1366 public RESULT createStream(string name, MODE mode, out Sound sound)
1367 {
1368 CREATESOUNDEXINFO exinfo = new CREATESOUNDEXINFO();
1369 exinfo.cbsize = Marshal.SizeOf<CREATESOUNDEXINFO>();
1370
1371 return createStream(name, mode, ref exinfo, out sound);
1372 }
1373 public RESULT createDSP(ref DSP_DESCRIPTION description, out DSP dsp)
1374 {
1375 return FMOD5_System_CreateDSP(this.handle, ref description, out dsp.handle);
1376 }
1377 public RESULT createDSPByType(DSP_TYPE type, out DSP dsp)
1378 {
1379 return FMOD5_System_CreateDSPByType(this.handle, type, out dsp.handle);
1380 }
1381 public RESULT createDSPConnection(DSPCONNECTION_TYPE type, out DSPConnection connection)
1382 {
1383 return FMOD5_System_CreateDSPConnection(this.handle, type, out connection.handle);
1384 }
1385 public RESULT createChannelGroup(string name, out ChannelGroup channelgroup)
1386 {
1387 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1388 {
1389 return FMOD5_System_CreateChannelGroup(this.handle, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(name), out channelgroup.handle);
1390 }
1391 }
1392 public RESULT createSoundGroup(string name, out SoundGroup soundgroup)
1393 {
1394 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1395 {
1396 return FMOD5_System_CreateSoundGroup(this.handle, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(name), out soundgroup.handle);
1397 }
1398 }
1399 public RESULT createReverb3D(out Reverb3D reverb)
1400 {
1401 return FMOD5_System_CreateReverb3D(this.handle, out reverb.handle);
1402 }
1403 public RESULT playSound(Sound sound, ChannelGroup channelgroup, bool paused, out Channel channel)
1404 {
1405 return FMOD5_System_PlaySound(this.handle, sound.handle, channelgroup.handle, paused, out channel.handle);
1406 }
1407 public RESULT playDSP(DSP dsp, ChannelGroup channelgroup, bool paused, out Channel channel)
1408 {
1409 return FMOD5_System_PlayDSP(this.handle, dsp.handle, channelgroup.handle, paused, out channel.handle);
1410 }
1411 public RESULT getChannel(int channelid, out Channel channel)
1412 {
1413 return FMOD5_System_GetChannel(this.handle, channelid, out channel.handle);
1414 }
1415 public RESULT getDSPInfoByType(DSP_TYPE type, out IntPtr description)
1416 {
1417 return FMOD5_System_GetDSPInfoByType(this.handle, type, out description);
1418 }
1419 public RESULT getMasterChannelGroup(out ChannelGroup channelgroup)
1420 {
1421 return FMOD5_System_GetMasterChannelGroup(this.handle, out channelgroup.handle);
1422 }
1423 public RESULT getMasterSoundGroup(out SoundGroup soundgroup)
1424 {
1425 return FMOD5_System_GetMasterSoundGroup(this.handle, out soundgroup.handle);
1426 }
1427
1428 // Routing to ports.
1429 public RESULT attachChannelGroupToPort(PORT_TYPE portType, ulong portIndex, ChannelGroup channelgroup, bool passThru = false)
1430 {
1431 return FMOD5_System_AttachChannelGroupToPort(this.handle, portType, portIndex, channelgroup.handle, passThru);
1432 }
1433 public RESULT detachChannelGroupFromPort(ChannelGroup channelgroup)
1434 {
1435 return FMOD5_System_DetachChannelGroupFromPort(this.handle, channelgroup.handle);
1436 }
1437
1438 // Reverb api.
1439 public RESULT setReverbProperties(int instance, ref REVERB_PROPERTIES prop)
1440 {
1441 return FMOD5_System_SetReverbProperties(this.handle, instance, ref prop);
1442 }
1443 public RESULT getReverbProperties(int instance, out REVERB_PROPERTIES prop)
1444 {
1445 return FMOD5_System_GetReverbProperties(this.handle, instance, out prop);
1446 }
1447
1448 // System level DSP functionality.
1449 public RESULT lockDSP()
1450 {
1451 return FMOD5_System_LockDSP(this.handle);
1452 }
1453 public RESULT unlockDSP()
1454 {
1455 return FMOD5_System_UnlockDSP(this.handle);
1456 }
1457
1458 // Recording api
1459 public RESULT getRecordNumDrivers(out int numdrivers, out int numconnected)
1460 {
1461 return FMOD5_System_GetRecordNumDrivers(this.handle, out numdrivers, out numconnected);
1462 }
1463 public RESULT getRecordDriverInfo(int id, out string name, int namelen, out Guid guid, out int systemrate, out SPEAKERMODE speakermode, out int speakermodechannels, out DRIVER_STATE state)
1464 {
1465 IntPtr stringMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(namelen);
1466
1467 RESULT result = FMOD5_System_GetRecordDriverInfo(this.handle, id, stringMem, namelen, out guid, out systemrate, out speakermode, out speakermodechannels, out state);
1468
1469 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1470 {
1471 name = encoder.stringFromNative(stringMem);
1472 }
1473 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(stringMem);
1474
1475 return result;
1476 }
1477 public RESULT getRecordDriverInfo(int id, out Guid guid, out int systemrate, out SPEAKERMODE speakermode, out int speakermodechannels, out DRIVER_STATE state)
1478 {
1479 return FMOD5_System_GetRecordDriverInfo(this.handle, id, IntPtr.Zero, 0, out guid, out systemrate, out speakermode, out speakermodechannels, out state);
1480 }
1481 public RESULT getRecordPosition(int id, out uint position)
1482 {
1483 return FMOD5_System_GetRecordPosition(this.handle, id, out position);
1484 }
1485 public RESULT recordStart(int id, Sound sound, bool loop)
1486 {
1487 return FMOD5_System_RecordStart(this.handle, id, sound.handle, loop);
1488 }
1489 public RESULT recordStop(int id)
1490 {
1491 return FMOD5_System_RecordStop(this.handle, id);
1492 }
1493 public RESULT isRecording(int id, out bool recording)
1494 {
1495 return FMOD5_System_IsRecording(this.handle, id, out recording);
1496 }
1497
1498 // Geometry api
1499 public RESULT createGeometry(int maxpolygons, int maxvertices, out Geometry geometry)
1500 {
1501 return FMOD5_System_CreateGeometry(this.handle, maxpolygons, maxvertices, out geometry.handle);
1502 }
1503 public RESULT setGeometrySettings(float maxworldsize)
1504 {
1505 return FMOD5_System_SetGeometrySettings(this.handle, maxworldsize);
1506 }
1507 public RESULT getGeometrySettings(out float maxworldsize)
1508 {
1509 return FMOD5_System_GetGeometrySettings(this.handle, out maxworldsize);
1510 }
1511 public RESULT loadGeometry(IntPtr data, int datasize, out Geometry geometry)
1512 {
1513 return FMOD5_System_LoadGeometry(this.handle, data, datasize, out geometry.handle);
1514 }
1515 public RESULT getGeometryOcclusion(ref VECTOR listener, ref VECTOR source, out float direct, out float reverb)
1516 {
1517 return FMOD5_System_GetGeometryOcclusion(this.handle, ref listener, ref source, out direct, out reverb);
1518 }
1519
1520 // Network functions
1521 public RESULT setNetworkProxy(string proxy)
1522 {
1523 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1524 {
1525 return FMOD5_System_SetNetworkProxy(this.handle, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(proxy));
1526 }
1527 }
1528 public RESULT getNetworkProxy(out string proxy, int proxylen)
1529 {
1530 IntPtr stringMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(proxylen);
1531
1532 RESULT result = FMOD5_System_GetNetworkProxy(this.handle, stringMem, proxylen);
1533 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1534 {
1535 proxy = encoder.stringFromNative(stringMem);
1536 }
1537 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(stringMem);
1538
1539 return result;
1540 }
1541 public RESULT setNetworkTimeout(int timeout)
1542 {
1543 return FMOD5_System_SetNetworkTimeout(this.handle, timeout);
1544 }
1545 public RESULT getNetworkTimeout(out int timeout)
1546 {
1547 return FMOD5_System_GetNetworkTimeout(this.handle, out timeout);
1548 }
1549
1550 // Userdata set/get
1551 public RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata)
1552 {
1553 return FMOD5_System_SetUserData(this.handle, userdata);
1554 }
1555 public RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata)
1556 {
1557 return FMOD5_System_GetUserData(this.handle, out userdata);
1558 }

1750
1751 #region wrapperinternal
1752
1753 public IntPtr handle;
1754
1755 public System(IntPtr ptr) { this.handle = ptr; }
1756 public bool hasHandle() { return this.handle != IntPtr.Zero; }
1757 public void clearHandle() { this.handle = IntPtr.Zero; }
1758
1759 #endregion
1760 }
1761
1762
1763 /*
1764 'Sound' API.
1765 */
1766 public struct Sound
1767 {
1768 public RESULT release()
1769 {
1770 return FMOD5_Sound_Release(this.handle);
1771 }
1772 public RESULT getSystemObject(out System system)
1773 {
1774 return FMOD5_Sound_GetSystemObject(this.handle, out system.handle);
1775 }
1776
1777 // Standard sound manipulation functions.
1778 public RESULT @lock(uint offset, uint length, out IntPtr ptr1, out IntPtr ptr2, out uint len1, out uint len2)
1779 {
1780 return FMOD5_Sound_Lock(this.handle, offset, length, out ptr1, out ptr2, out len1, out len2);
1781 }
1782 public RESULT unlock(IntPtr ptr1, IntPtr ptr2, uint len1, uint len2)
1783 {
1784 return FMOD5_Sound_Unlock(this.handle, ptr1, ptr2, len1, len2);
1785 }
1786 public RESULT setDefaults(float frequency, int priority)
1787 {
1788 return FMOD5_Sound_SetDefaults(this.handle, frequency, priority);
1789 }
1790 public RESULT getDefaults(out float frequency, out int priority)
1791 {
1792 return FMOD5_Sound_GetDefaults(this.handle, out frequency, out priority);
1793 }
1794 public RESULT set3DMinMaxDistance(float min, float max)
1795 {
1796 return FMOD5_Sound_Set3DMinMaxDistance(this.handle, min, max);
1797 }
1798 public RESULT get3DMinMaxDistance(out float min, out float max)
1799 {
1800 return FMOD5_Sound_Get3DMinMaxDistance(this.handle, out min, out max);
1801 }
1802 public RESULT set3DConeSettings(float insideconeangle, float outsideconeangle, float outsidevolume)
1803 {
1804 return FMOD5_Sound_Set3DConeSettings(this.handle, insideconeangle, outsideconeangle, outsidevolume);
1805 }
1806 public RESULT get3DConeSettings(out float insideconeangle, out float outsideconeangle, out float outsidevolume)
1807 {
1808 return FMOD5_Sound_Get3DConeSettings(this.handle, out insideconeangle, out outsideconeangle, out outsidevolume);
1809 }
1810 public RESULT set3DCustomRolloff(ref VECTOR points, int numpoints)
1811 {
1812 return FMOD5_Sound_Set3DCustomRolloff(this.handle, ref points, numpoints);
1813 }
1814 public RESULT get3DCustomRolloff(out IntPtr points, out int numpoints)
1815 {
1816 return FMOD5_Sound_Get3DCustomRolloff(this.handle, out points, out numpoints);
1817 }
1818
1819 public RESULT getSubSound(int index, out Sound subsound)
1820 {
1821 return FMOD5_Sound_GetSubSound(this.handle, index, out subsound.handle);
1822 }
1823 public RESULT getSubSoundParent(out Sound parentsound)
1824 {
1825 return FMOD5_Sound_GetSubSoundParent(this.handle, out parentsound.handle);
1826 }
1827 public RESULT getName(out string name, int namelen)
1828 {
1829 IntPtr stringMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(namelen);
1830
1831 RESULT result = FMOD5_Sound_GetName(this.handle, stringMem, namelen);
1832 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1833 {
1834 name = encoder.stringFromNative(stringMem);
1835 }
1836 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(stringMem);
1837
1838 return result;
1839 }
1840 public RESULT getLength(out uint length, TIMEUNIT lengthtype)
1841 {
1842 return FMOD5_Sound_GetLength(this.handle, out length, lengthtype);
1843 }
1844 public RESULT getFormat(out SOUND_TYPE type, out SOUND_FORMAT format, out int channels, out int bits)
1845 {
1846 return FMOD5_Sound_GetFormat(this.handle, out type, out format, out channels, out bits);
1847 }
1848 public RESULT getNumSubSounds(out int numsubsounds)
1849 {
1850 return FMOD5_Sound_GetNumSubSounds(this.handle, out numsubsounds);
1851 }
1852 public RESULT getNumTags(out int numtags, out int numtagsupdated)
1853 {
1854 return FMOD5_Sound_GetNumTags(this.handle, out numtags, out numtagsupdated);
1855 }
1856 public RESULT getTag(string name, int index, out TAG tag)
1857 {
1858 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1859 {
1860 return FMOD5_Sound_GetTag(this.handle, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(name), index, out tag);
1861 }
1862 }
1863 public RESULT getOpenState(out OPENSTATE openstate, out uint percentbuffered, out bool starving, out bool diskbusy)
1864 {
1865 return FMOD5_Sound_GetOpenState(this.handle, out openstate, out percentbuffered, out starving, out diskbusy);
1866 }
1867 public RESULT readData(byte[] buffer)
1868 {
1869 return FMOD5_Sound_ReadData(this.handle, buffer, (uint)buffer.Length, IntPtr.Zero);
1870 }
1871 public RESULT readData(byte[] buffer, out uint read)
1872 {
1873 return FMOD5_Sound_ReadData(this.handle, buffer, (uint)buffer.Length, out read);
1874 }
1875 public RESULT seekData(uint pcm)
1876 {
1877 return FMOD5_Sound_SeekData(this.handle, pcm);
1878 }
1879 public RESULT setSoundGroup(SoundGroup soundgroup)
1880 {
1881 return FMOD5_Sound_SetSoundGroup(this.handle, soundgroup.handle);
1882 }
1883 public RESULT getSoundGroup(out SoundGroup soundgroup)
1884 {
1885 return FMOD5_Sound_GetSoundGroup(this.handle, out soundgroup.handle);
1886 }
1887
1888 // Synchronization point API. These points can come from markers embedded in wav files, and can also generate channel callbacks.
1889 public RESULT getNumSyncPoints(out int numsyncpoints)
1890 {
1891 return FMOD5_Sound_GetNumSyncPoints(this.handle, out numsyncpoints);
1892 }
1893 public RESULT getSyncPoint(int index, out IntPtr point)
1894 {
1895 return FMOD5_Sound_GetSyncPoint(this.handle, index, out point);
1896 }
1897 public RESULT getSyncPointInfo(IntPtr point, out string name, int namelen, out uint offset, TIMEUNIT offsettype)
1898 {
1899 IntPtr stringMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(namelen);
1900
1901 RESULT result = FMOD5_Sound_GetSyncPointInfo(this.handle, point, stringMem, namelen, out offset, offsettype);
1902 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1903 {
1904 name = encoder.stringFromNative(stringMem);
1905 }
1906 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(stringMem);
1907
1908 return result;
1909 }
1910 public RESULT getSyncPointInfo(IntPtr point, out uint offset, TIMEUNIT offsettype)
1911 {
1912 return FMOD5_Sound_GetSyncPointInfo(this.handle, point, IntPtr.Zero, 0, out offset, offsettype);
1913 }
1914 public RESULT addSyncPoint(uint offset, TIMEUNIT offsettype, string name, out IntPtr point)
1915 {
1916 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
1917 {
1918 return FMOD5_Sound_AddSyncPoint(this.handle, offset, offsettype, encoder.byteFromStringUTF8(name), out point);
1919 }
1920 }
1921 public RESULT deleteSyncPoint(IntPtr point)
1922 {
1923 return FMOD5_Sound_DeleteSyncPoint(this.handle, point);
1924 }
1925
1926 // Functions also in Channel class but here they are the 'default' to save having to change it in Channel all the time.
1927 public RESULT setMode(MODE mode)
1928 {
1929 return FMOD5_Sound_SetMode(this.handle, mode);
1930 }
1931 public RESULT getMode(out MODE mode)
1932 {
1933 return FMOD5_Sound_GetMode(this.handle, out mode);
1934 }
1935 public RESULT setLoopCount(int loopcount)
1936 {
1937 return FMOD5_Sound_SetLoopCount(this.handle, loopcount);
1938 }
1939 public RESULT getLoopCount(out int loopcount)
1940 {
1941 return FMOD5_Sound_GetLoopCount(this.handle, out loopcount);
1942 }
1943 public RESULT setLoopPoints(uint loopstart, TIMEUNIT loopstarttype, uint loopend, TIMEUNIT loopendtype)
1944 {
1945 return FMOD5_Sound_SetLoopPoints(this.handle, loopstart, loopstarttype, loopend, loopendtype);
1946 }
1947 public RESULT getLoopPoints(out uint loopstart, TIMEUNIT loopstarttype, out uint loopend, TIMEUNIT loopendtype)
1948 {
1949 return FMOD5_Sound_GetLoopPoints(this.handle, out loopstart, loopstarttype, out loopend, loopendtype);
1950 }
1951
1952 // For MOD/S3M/XM/IT/MID sequenced formats only.
1953 public RESULT getMusicNumChannels(out int numchannels)
1954 {
1955 return FMOD5_Sound_GetMusicNumChannels(this.handle, out numchannels);
1956 }
1957 public RESULT setMusicChannelVolume(int channel, float volume)
1958 {
1959 return FMOD5_Sound_SetMusicChannelVolume(this.handle, channel, volume);
1960 }
1961 public RESULT getMusicChannelVolume(int channel, out float volume)
1962 {
1963 return FMOD5_Sound_GetMusicChannelVolume(this.handle, channel, out volume);
1964 }
1965 public RESULT setMusicSpeed(float speed)
1966 {
1967 return FMOD5_Sound_SetMusicSpeed(this.handle, speed);
1968 }
1969 public RESULT getMusicSpeed(out float speed)
1970 {
1971 return FMOD5_Sound_GetMusicSpeed(this.handle, out speed);
1972 }
1973
1974 // Userdata set/get.
1975 public RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata)
1976 {
1977 return FMOD5_Sound_SetUserData(this.handle, userdata);
1978 }
1979 public RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata)
1980 {
1981 return FMOD5_Sound_GetUserData(this.handle, out userdata);
1982 }
1983
1984 #region importfunctions
1985 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1986 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Release(IntPtr sound);
1987 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1988 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetSystemObject(IntPtr sound, out IntPtr system);
1989 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1990 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Lock(IntPtr sound, uint offset, uint length, out IntPtr ptr1, out IntPtr ptr2, out uint len1, out uint len2);
1991 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1992 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Unlock(IntPtr sound, IntPtr ptr1, IntPtr ptr2, uint len1, uint len2);
1993 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1994 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SetDefaults(IntPtr sound, float frequency, int priority);
1995 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1996 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetDefaults(IntPtr sound, out float frequency, out int priority);
1997 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
1998 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Set3DMinMaxDistance(IntPtr sound, float min, float max);
1999 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2000 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Get3DMinMaxDistance(IntPtr sound, out float min, out float max);
2001 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2002 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Set3DConeSettings(IntPtr sound, float insideconeangle, float outsideconeangle, float outsidevolume);
2003 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2004 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Get3DConeSettings(IntPtr sound, out float insideconeangle, out float outsideconeangle, out float outsidevolume);
2005 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2006 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Set3DCustomRolloff(IntPtr sound, ref VECTOR points, int numpoints);
2007 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2008 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_Get3DCustomRolloff(IntPtr sound, out IntPtr points, out int numpoints);
2009 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2010 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetSubSound(IntPtr sound, int index, out IntPtr subsound);
2011 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2012 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetSubSoundParent(IntPtr sound, out IntPtr parentsound);
2013 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2014 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetName(IntPtr sound, IntPtr name, int namelen);
2015 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2016 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetLength(IntPtr sound, out uint length, TIMEUNIT lengthtype);
2017 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2018 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetFormat(IntPtr sound, out SOUND_TYPE type, out SOUND_FORMAT format, out int channels, out int bits);
2019 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2020 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetNumSubSounds(IntPtr sound, out int numsubsounds);
2021 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2022 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetNumTags(IntPtr sound, out int numtags, out int numtagsupdated);
2023 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2024 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetTag(IntPtr sound, byte[] name, int index, out TAG tag);
2025 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2026 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetOpenState(IntPtr sound, out OPENSTATE openstate, out uint percentbuffered, out bool starving, out bool diskbusy);
2027 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2028 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_ReadData(IntPtr sound, byte[] buffer, uint length, IntPtr zero);
2029 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2030 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_ReadData(IntPtr sound, byte[] buffer, uint length, out uint read);
2031 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2032 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SeekData(IntPtr sound, uint pcm);
2033 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2034 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SetSoundGroup(IntPtr sound, IntPtr soundgroup);
2035 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2036 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetSoundGroup(IntPtr sound, out IntPtr soundgroup);
2037 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2038 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetNumSyncPoints(IntPtr sound, out int numsyncpoints);
2039 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2040 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetSyncPoint(IntPtr sound, int index, out IntPtr point);
2041 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2042 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetSyncPointInfo(IntPtr sound, IntPtr point, IntPtr name, int namelen, out uint offset, TIMEUNIT offsettype);
2043 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2044 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_AddSyncPoint(IntPtr sound, uint offset, TIMEUNIT offsettype, byte[] name, out IntPtr point);
2045 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2046 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_DeleteSyncPoint(IntPtr sound, IntPtr point);
2047 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2048 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SetMode(IntPtr sound, MODE mode);
2049 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2050 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetMode(IntPtr sound, out MODE mode);
2051 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2052 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SetLoopCount(IntPtr sound, int loopcount);
2053 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2054 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetLoopCount(IntPtr sound, out int loopcount);
2055 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2056 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SetLoopPoints(IntPtr sound, uint loopstart, TIMEUNIT loopstarttype, uint loopend, TIMEUNIT loopendtype);
2057 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2058 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetLoopPoints(IntPtr sound, out uint loopstart, TIMEUNIT loopstarttype, out uint loopend, TIMEUNIT loopendtype);
2059 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2060 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetMusicNumChannels(IntPtr sound, out int numchannels);
2061 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2062 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SetMusicChannelVolume(IntPtr sound, int channel, float volume);
2063 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2064 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetMusicChannelVolume(IntPtr sound, int channel, out float volume);
2065 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2066 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SetMusicSpeed(IntPtr sound, float speed);
2067 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2068 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetMusicSpeed(IntPtr sound, out float speed);
2069 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2070 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_SetUserData(IntPtr sound, IntPtr userdata);
2071 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2072 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Sound_GetUserData(IntPtr sound, out IntPtr userdata);
2073 #endregion
2074
2075 #region wrapperinternal
2076
2077 public IntPtr handle;
2078
2079 public Sound(IntPtr ptr) { this.handle = ptr; }
2080 public bool hasHandle() { return this.handle != IntPtr.Zero; }
2081 public void clearHandle() { this.handle = IntPtr.Zero; }
2082
2083 #endregion
2084 }
2085
2086 /*
2087 'ChannelControl' API
2088 */
2089 interface IChannelControl
2090 {
2091 RESULT getSystemObject(out System system);
2092
2093 // General control functionality for Channels and ChannelGroups.
2094 RESULT stop();
2095 RESULT setPaused(bool paused);
2096 RESULT getPaused(out bool paused);
2097 RESULT setVolume(float volume);
2098 RESULT getVolume(out float volume);
2099 RESULT setVolumeRamp(bool ramp);
2100 RESULT getVolumeRamp(out bool ramp);
2101 RESULT getAudibility(out float audibility);
2102 RESULT setPitch(float pitch);
2103 RESULT getPitch(out float pitch);
2104 RESULT setMute(bool mute);
2105 RESULT getMute(out bool mute);
2106 RESULT setReverbProperties(int instance, float wet);
2107 RESULT getReverbProperties(int instance, out float wet);
2108 RESULT setLowPassGain(float gain);
2109 RESULT getLowPassGain(out float gain);
2110 RESULT setMode(MODE mode);
2111 RESULT getMode(out MODE mode);
2112 RESULT setCallback(CHANNELCONTROL_CALLBACK callback);
2113 RESULT isPlaying(out bool isplaying);
2114
2115 // Note all 'set' functions alter a final matrix, this is why the only get function is getMixMatrix, to avoid other get functions returning incorrect/obsolete values.
2116 RESULT setPan(float pan);
2117 RESULT setMixLevelsOutput(float frontleft, float frontright, float center, float lfe, float surroundleft, float surroundright, float backleft, float backright);
2118 RESULT setMixLevelsInput(float[] levels, int numlevels);
2119 RESULT setMixMatrix(float[] matrix, int outchannels, int inchannels, int inchannel_hop);
2120 RESULT getMixMatrix(float[] matrix, out int outchannels, out int inchannels, int inchannel_hop);
2121
2122 // Clock based functionality.
2123 RESULT getDSPClock(out ulong dspclock, out ulong parentclock);
2124 RESULT setDelay(ulong dspclock_start, ulong dspclock_end, bool stopchannels);
2125 RESULT getDelay(out ulong dspclock_start, out ulong dspclock_end);
2126 RESULT getDelay(out ulong dspclock_start, out ulong dspclock_end, out bool stopchannels);
2127 RESULT addFadePoint(ulong dspclock, float volume);
2128 RESULT setFadePointRamp(ulong dspclock, float volume);
2129 RESULT removeFadePoints(ulong dspclock_start, ulong dspclock_end);
2130 RESULT getFadePoints(ref uint numpoints, ulong[] point_dspclock, float[] point_volume);
2131
2132 // DSP effects.
2133 RESULT getDSP(int index, out DSP dsp);
2134 RESULT addDSP(int index, DSP dsp);
2135 RESULT removeDSP(DSP dsp);
2136 RESULT getNumDSPs(out int numdsps);
2137 RESULT setDSPIndex(DSP dsp, int index);
2138 RESULT getDSPIndex(DSP dsp, out int index);
2139
2140 // 3D functionality.
2141 RESULT set3DAttributes(ref VECTOR pos, ref VECTOR vel);
2142 RESULT get3DAttributes(out VECTOR pos, out VECTOR vel);
2143 RESULT set3DMinMaxDistance(float mindistance, float maxdistance);
2144 RESULT get3DMinMaxDistance(out float mindistance, out float maxdistance);
2145 RESULT set3DConeSettings(float insideconeangle, float outsideconeangle, float outsidevolume);
2146 RESULT get3DConeSettings(out float insideconeangle, out float outsideconeangle, out float outsidevolume);
2147 RESULT set3DConeOrientation(ref VECTOR orientation);
2148 RESULT get3DConeOrientation(out VECTOR orientation);
2149 RESULT set3DCustomRolloff(ref VECTOR points, int numpoints);
2150 RESULT get3DCustomRolloff(out IntPtr points, out int numpoints);
2151 RESULT set3DOcclusion(float directocclusion, float reverbocclusion);
2152 RESULT get3DOcclusion(out float directocclusion, out float reverbocclusion);
2153 RESULT set3DSpread(float angle);
2154 RESULT get3DSpread(out float angle);
2155 RESULT set3DLevel(float level);
2156 RESULT get3DLevel(out float level);
2157 RESULT set3DDopplerLevel(float level);
2158 RESULT get3DDopplerLevel(out float level);
2159 RESULT set3DDistanceFilter(bool custom, float customLevel, float centerFreq);
2160 RESULT get3DDistanceFilter(out bool custom, out float customLevel, out float centerFreq);
2161
2162 // Userdata set/get.
2163 RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata);
2164 RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata);
2165 }
2166
2167 /*
2168 'Channel' API
2169 */
2170 public struct Channel : IChannelControl
2171 {
2172 // Channel specific control functionality.
2173 public RESULT setFrequency(float frequency)
2174 {
2175 return FMOD5_Channel_SetFrequency(this.handle, frequency);
2176 }
2177 public RESULT getFrequency(out float frequency)
2178 {
2179 return FMOD5_Channel_GetFrequency(this.handle, out frequency);
2180 }
2181 public RESULT setPriority(int priority)
2182 {
2183 return FMOD5_Channel_SetPriority(this.handle, priority);
2184 }
2185 public RESULT getPriority(out int priority)
2186 {
2187 return FMOD5_Channel_GetPriority(this.handle, out priority);
2188 }
2189 public RESULT setPosition(uint position, TIMEUNIT postype)
2190 {
2191 return FMOD5_Channel_SetPosition(this.handle, position, postype);
2192 }
2193 public RESULT getPosition(out uint position, TIMEUNIT postype)
2194 {
2195 return FMOD5_Channel_GetPosition(this.handle, out position, postype);
2196 }
2197 public RESULT setChannelGroup(ChannelGroup channelgroup)
2198 {
2199 return FMOD5_Channel_SetChannelGroup(this.handle, channelgroup.handle);
2200 }
2201 public RESULT getChannelGroup(out ChannelGroup channelgroup)
2202 {
2203 return FMOD5_Channel_GetChannelGroup(this.handle, out channelgroup.handle);
2204 }
2205 public RESULT setLoopCount(int loopcount)
2206 {
2207 return FMOD5_Channel_SetLoopCount(this.handle, loopcount);
2208 }
2209 public RESULT getLoopCount(out int loopcount)
2210 {
2211 return FMOD5_Channel_GetLoopCount(this.handle, out loopcount);
2212 }
2213 public RESULT setLoopPoints(uint loopstart, TIMEUNIT loopstarttype, uint loopend, TIMEUNIT loopendtype)
2214 {
2215 return FMOD5_Channel_SetLoopPoints(this.handle, loopstart, loopstarttype, loopend, loopendtype);
2216 }
2217 public RESULT getLoopPoints(out uint loopstart, TIMEUNIT loopstarttype, out uint loopend, TIMEUNIT loopendtype)
2218 {
2219 return FMOD5_Channel_GetLoopPoints(this.handle, out loopstart, loopstarttype, out loopend, loopendtype);
2220 }
2221
2222 // Information only functions.
2223 public RESULT isVirtual(out bool isvirtual)
2224 {
2225 return FMOD5_Channel_IsVirtual(this.handle, out isvirtual);
2226 }
2227 public RESULT getCurrentSound(out Sound sound)
2228 {
2229 return FMOD5_Channel_GetCurrentSound(this.handle, out sound.handle);
2230 }
2231 public RESULT getIndex(out int index)
2232 {
2233 return FMOD5_Channel_GetIndex(this.handle, out index);
2234 }
2235
2236 public RESULT getSystemObject(out System system)
2237 {
2238 return FMOD5_Channel_GetSystemObject(this.handle, out system.handle);
2239 }
2240
2241 // General control functionality for Channels and ChannelGroups.
2242 public RESULT stop()
2243 {
2244 return FMOD5_Channel_Stop(this.handle);
2245 }
2246 public RESULT setPaused(bool paused)
2247 {
2248 return FMOD5_Channel_SetPaused(this.handle, paused);
2249 }
2250 public RESULT getPaused(out bool paused)
2251 {
2252 return FMOD5_Channel_GetPaused(this.handle, out paused);
2253 }
2254 public RESULT setVolume(float volume)
2255 {
2256 return FMOD5_Channel_SetVolume(this.handle, volume);
2257 }
2258 public RESULT getVolume(out float volume)
2259 {
2260 return FMOD5_Channel_GetVolume(this.handle, out volume);
2261 }
2262 public RESULT setVolumeRamp(bool ramp)
2263 {
2264 return FMOD5_Channel_SetVolumeRamp(this.handle, ramp);
2265 }
2266 public RESULT getVolumeRamp(out bool ramp)
2267 {
2268 return FMOD5_Channel_GetVolumeRamp(this.handle, out ramp);
2269 }
2270 public RESULT getAudibility(out float audibility)
2271 {
2272 return FMOD5_Channel_GetAudibility(this.handle, out audibility);
2273 }
2274 public RESULT setPitch(float pitch)
2275 {
2276 return FMOD5_Channel_SetPitch(this.handle, pitch);
2277 }
2278 public RESULT getPitch(out float pitch)
2279 {
2280 return FMOD5_Channel_GetPitch(this.handle, out pitch);
2281 }
2282 public RESULT setMute(bool mute)
2283 {
2284 return FMOD5_Channel_SetMute(this.handle, mute);
2285 }
2286 public RESULT getMute(out bool mute)
2287 {
2288 return FMOD5_Channel_GetMute(this.handle, out mute);
2289 }
2290 public RESULT setReverbProperties(int instance, float wet)
2291 {
2292 return FMOD5_Channel_SetReverbProperties(this.handle, instance, wet);
2293 }
2294 public RESULT getReverbProperties(int instance, out float wet)
2295 {
2296 return FMOD5_Channel_GetReverbProperties(this.handle, instance, out wet);
2297 }
2298 public RESULT setLowPassGain(float gain)
2299 {
2300 return FMOD5_Channel_SetLowPassGain(this.handle, gain);
2301 }
2302 public RESULT getLowPassGain(out float gain)
2303 {
2304 return FMOD5_Channel_GetLowPassGain(this.handle, out gain);
2305 }
2306 public RESULT setMode(MODE mode)
2307 {
2308 return FMOD5_Channel_SetMode(this.handle, mode);
2309 }
2310 public RESULT getMode(out MODE mode)
2311 {
2312 return FMOD5_Channel_GetMode(this.handle, out mode);
2313 }
2314 public RESULT setCallback(CHANNELCONTROL_CALLBACK callback)
2315 {
2316 return FMOD5_Channel_SetCallback(this.handle, callback);
2317 }
2318 public RESULT isPlaying(out bool isplaying)
2319 {
2320 return FMOD5_Channel_IsPlaying(this.handle, out isplaying);
2321 }
2322
2323 // Note all 'set' functions alter a final matrix, this is why the only get function is getMixMatrix, to avoid other get functions returning incorrect/obsolete values.
2324 public RESULT setPan(float pan)
2325 {
2326 return FMOD5_Channel_SetPan(this.handle, pan);
2327 }
2328 public RESULT setMixLevelsOutput(float frontleft, float frontright, float center, float lfe, float surroundleft, float surroundright, float backleft, float backright)
2329 {
2330 return FMOD5_Channel_SetMixLevelsOutput(this.handle, frontleft, frontright, center, lfe, surroundleft, surroundright, backleft, backright);
2331 }
2332 public RESULT setMixLevelsInput(float[] levels, int numlevels)
2333 {
2334 return FMOD5_Channel_SetMixLevelsInput(this.handle, levels, numlevels);
2335 }
2336 public RESULT setMixMatrix(float[] matrix, int outchannels, int inchannels, int inchannel_hop = 0)
2337 {
2338 return FMOD5_Channel_SetMixMatrix(this.handle, matrix, outchannels, inchannels, inchannel_hop);
2339 }
2340 public RESULT getMixMatrix(float[] matrix, out int outchannels, out int inchannels, int inchannel_hop = 0)
2341 {
2342 return FMOD5_Channel_GetMixMatrix(this.handle, matrix, out outchannels, out inchannels, inchannel_hop);
2343 }
2344
2345 // Clock based functionality.
2346 public RESULT getDSPClock(out ulong dspclock, out ulong parentclock)
2347 {
2348 return FMOD5_Channel_GetDSPClock(this.handle, out dspclock, out parentclock);
2349 }
2350 public RESULT setDelay(ulong dspclock_start, ulong dspclock_end, bool stopchannels = true)
2351 {
2352 return FMOD5_Channel_SetDelay(this.handle, dspclock_start, dspclock_end, stopchannels);
2353 }
2354 public RESULT getDelay(out ulong dspclock_start, out ulong dspclock_end)
2355 {
2356 return FMOD5_Channel_GetDelay(this.handle, out dspclock_start, out dspclock_end, IntPtr.Zero);
2357 }
2358 public RESULT getDelay(out ulong dspclock_start, out ulong dspclock_end, out bool stopchannels)
2359 {
2360 return FMOD5_Channel_GetDelay(this.handle, out dspclock_start, out dspclock_end, out stopchannels);
2361 }
2362 public RESULT addFadePoint(ulong dspclock, float volume)
2363 {
2364 return FMOD5_Channel_AddFadePoint(this.handle, dspclock, volume);
2365 }
2366 public RESULT setFadePointRamp(ulong dspclock, float volume)
2367 {
2368 return FMOD5_Channel_SetFadePointRamp(this.handle, dspclock, volume);
2369 }
2370 public RESULT removeFadePoints(ulong dspclock_start, ulong dspclock_end)
2371 {
2372 return FMOD5_Channel_RemoveFadePoints(this.handle, dspclock_start, dspclock_end);
2373 }
2374 public RESULT getFadePoints(ref uint numpoints, ulong[] point_dspclock, float[] point_volume)
2375 {
2376 return FMOD5_Channel_GetFadePoints(this.handle, ref numpoints, point_dspclock, point_volume);
2377 }
2378
2379 // DSP effects.
2380 public RESULT getDSP(int index, out DSP dsp)
2381 {
2382 return FMOD5_Channel_GetDSP(this.handle, index, out dsp.handle);
2383 }
2384 public RESULT addDSP(int index, DSP dsp)
2385 {
2386 return FMOD5_Channel_AddDSP(this.handle, index, dsp.handle);
2387 }
2388 public RESULT removeDSP(DSP dsp)
2389 {
2390 return FMOD5_Channel_RemoveDSP(this.handle, dsp.handle);
2391 }
2392 public RESULT getNumDSPs(out int numdsps)
2393 {
2394 return FMOD5_Channel_GetNumDSPs(this.handle, out numdsps);
2395 }
2396 public RESULT setDSPIndex(DSP dsp, int index)
2397 {
2398 return FMOD5_Channel_SetDSPIndex(this.handle, dsp.handle, index);
2399 }
2400 public RESULT getDSPIndex(DSP dsp, out int index)
2401 {
2402 return FMOD5_Channel_GetDSPIndex(this.handle, dsp.handle, out index);
2403 }
2404
2405 // 3D functionality.
2406 public RESULT set3DAttributes(ref VECTOR pos, ref VECTOR vel)
2407 {
2408 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DAttributes(this.handle, ref pos, ref vel);
2409 }
2410 public RESULT get3DAttributes(out VECTOR pos, out VECTOR vel)
2411 {
2412 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DAttributes(this.handle, out pos, out vel);
2413 }
2414 public RESULT set3DMinMaxDistance(float mindistance, float maxdistance)
2415 {
2416 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DMinMaxDistance(this.handle, mindistance, maxdistance);
2417 }
2418 public RESULT get3DMinMaxDistance(out float mindistance, out float maxdistance)
2419 {
2420 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DMinMaxDistance(this.handle, out mindistance, out maxdistance);
2421 }
2422 public RESULT set3DConeSettings(float insideconeangle, float outsideconeangle, float outsidevolume)
2423 {
2424 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DConeSettings(this.handle, insideconeangle, outsideconeangle, outsidevolume);
2425 }
2426 public RESULT get3DConeSettings(out float insideconeangle, out float outsideconeangle, out float outsidevolume)
2427 {
2428 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DConeSettings(this.handle, out insideconeangle, out outsideconeangle, out outsidevolume);
2429 }
2430 public RESULT set3DConeOrientation(ref VECTOR orientation)
2431 {
2432 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DConeOrientation(this.handle, ref orientation);
2433 }
2434 public RESULT get3DConeOrientation(out VECTOR orientation)
2435 {
2436 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DConeOrientation(this.handle, out orientation);
2437 }
2438 public RESULT set3DCustomRolloff(ref VECTOR points, int numpoints)
2439 {
2440 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DCustomRolloff(this.handle, ref points, numpoints);
2441 }
2442 public RESULT get3DCustomRolloff(out IntPtr points, out int numpoints)
2443 {
2444 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DCustomRolloff(this.handle, out points, out numpoints);
2445 }
2446 public RESULT set3DOcclusion(float directocclusion, float reverbocclusion)
2447 {
2448 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DOcclusion(this.handle, directocclusion, reverbocclusion);
2449 }
2450 public RESULT get3DOcclusion(out float directocclusion, out float reverbocclusion)
2451 {
2452 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DOcclusion(this.handle, out directocclusion, out reverbocclusion);
2453 }
2454 public RESULT set3DSpread(float angle)
2455 {
2456 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DSpread(this.handle, angle);
2457 }
2458 public RESULT get3DSpread(out float angle)
2459 {
2460 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DSpread(this.handle, out angle);
2461 }
2462 public RESULT set3DLevel(float level)
2463 {
2464 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DLevel(this.handle, level);
2465 }
2466 public RESULT get3DLevel(out float level)
2467 {
2468 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DLevel(this.handle, out level);
2469 }
2470 public RESULT set3DDopplerLevel(float level)
2471 {
2472 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DDopplerLevel(this.handle, level);
2473 }
2474 public RESULT get3DDopplerLevel(out float level)
2475 {
2476 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DDopplerLevel(this.handle, out level);
2477 }
2478 public RESULT set3DDistanceFilter(bool custom, float customLevel, float centerFreq)
2479 {
2480 return FMOD5_Channel_Set3DDistanceFilter(this.handle, custom, customLevel, centerFreq);
2481 }
2482 public RESULT get3DDistanceFilter(out bool custom, out float customLevel, out float centerFreq)
2483 {
2484 return FMOD5_Channel_Get3DDistanceFilter(this.handle, out custom, out customLevel, out centerFreq);
2485 }
2486
2487 // Userdata set/get.
2488 public RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata)
2489 {
2490 return FMOD5_Channel_SetUserData(this.handle, userdata);
2491 }
2492 public RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata)
2493 {
2494 return FMOD5_Channel_GetUserData(this.handle, out userdata);
2495 }

2556 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]

2560 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2561 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Channel_GetLowPassGain(IntPtr channel, out float gain);
2562 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2563 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Channel_SetMode(IntPtr channel, MODE mode);
2564 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
2565 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Channel_GetMode(IntPtr channel, out MODE mode);

2573 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Channel_SetMixLevelsOutput(IntPtr channel, float frontleft, float frontright, float center, float lfe, float surroundleft, float surroundright, float backleft, float backright);

2587 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Channel_GetDelay(IntPtr channel, out ulong dspclock_start, out ulong dspclock_end, out bool stopchannels);

2601 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Channel_RemoveDSP(IntPtr channel, IntPtr dsp);

2618 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
