2653
2654 #region wrapperinternal
2655
2656 public IntPtr handle;
2657
2658 public Channel(IntPtr ptr) { this.handle = ptr; }
2659 public bool hasHandle() { return this.handle != IntPtr.Zero; }
2660 public void clearHandle() { this.handle = IntPtr.Zero; }
2661
2662 #endregion
2663 }
2664
2665 /*
2666 'ChannelGroup' API
2667 */
2668 public struct ChannelGroup : IChannelControl
2669 {
2670 public RESULT release()
2671 {
2672 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_Release(this.handle);
2673 }
2674
2675 // Nested channel groups.
2676 public RESULT addGroup(ChannelGroup group, bool propagatedspclock = true)
2677 {
2678 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_AddGroup(this.handle, group.handle, propagatedspclock, IntPtr.Zero);
2679 }
2680 public RESULT addGroup(ChannelGroup group, bool propagatedspclock, out DSPConnection connection)
2681 {
2682 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_AddGroup(this.handle, group.handle, propagatedspclock, out connection.handle);
2683 }
2684 public RESULT getNumGroups(out int numgroups)
2685 {
2686 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetNumGroups(this.handle, out numgroups);
2687 }
2688 public RESULT getGroup(int index, out ChannelGroup group)
2689 {
2690 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetGroup(this.handle, index, out group.handle);
2691 }
2692 public RESULT getParentGroup(out ChannelGroup group)
2693 {
2694 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetParentGroup(this.handle, out group.handle);
2695 }
2696
2697 // Information only functions.
2698 public RESULT getName(out string name, int namelen)
2699 {
2700 IntPtr stringMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(namelen);
2701
2702 RESULT result = FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetName(this.handle, stringMem, namelen);
2703 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
2704 {
2705 name = encoder.stringFromNative(stringMem);
2706 }
2707 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(stringMem);
2708
2709 return result;
2710 }
2711 public RESULT getNumChannels(out int numchannels)
2712 {
2713 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetNumChannels(this.handle, out numchannels);
2714 }
2715 public RESULT getChannel(int index, out Channel channel)
2716 {
2717 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetChannel(this.handle, index, out channel.handle);
2718 }
2719
2720 public RESULT getSystemObject(out System system)
2721 {
2722 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetSystemObject(this.handle, out system.handle);
2723 }
2724
2725 // General control functionality for Channels and ChannelGroups.
2726 public RESULT stop()
2727 {
2728 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_Stop(this.handle);
2729 }
2730 public RESULT setPaused(bool paused)
2731 {
2732 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetPaused(this.handle, paused);
2733 }
2734 public RESULT getPaused(out bool paused)
2735 {
2736 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetPaused(this.handle, out paused);
2737 }
2738 public RESULT setVolume(float volume)
2739 {
2740 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetVolume(this.handle, volume);
2741 }
2742 public RESULT getVolume(out float volume)
2743 {
2744 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetVolume(this.handle, out volume);
2745 }
2746 public RESULT setVolumeRamp(bool ramp)
2747 {
2748 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetVolumeRamp(this.handle, ramp);
2749 }
2750 public RESULT getVolumeRamp(out bool ramp)
2751 {
2752 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetVolumeRamp(this.handle, out ramp);
2753 }
2754 public RESULT getAudibility(out float audibility)
2755 {
2756 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetAudibility(this.handle, out audibility);
2757 }
2758 public RESULT setPitch(float pitch)
2759 {
2760 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetPitch(this.handle, pitch);
2761 }
2762 public RESULT getPitch(out float pitch)
2763 {
2764 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetPitch(this.handle, out pitch);
2765 }
2766 public RESULT setMute(bool mute)
2767 {
2768 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetMute(this.handle, mute);
2769 }
2770 public RESULT getMute(out bool mute)
2771 {
2772 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetMute(this.handle, out mute);
2773 }
2774 public RESULT setReverbProperties(int instance, float wet)
2775 {
2776 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetReverbProperties(this.handle, instance, wet);
2777 }
2778 public RESULT getReverbProperties(int instance, out float wet)
2779 {
2780 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetReverbProperties(this.handle, instance, out wet);
2781 }
2782 public RESULT setLowPassGain(float gain)
2783 {
2784 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetLowPassGain(this.handle, gain);
2785 }
2786 public RESULT getLowPassGain(out float gain)
2787 {
2788 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetLowPassGain(this.handle, out gain);
2789 }
2790 public RESULT setMode(MODE mode)
2791 {
2792 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetMode(this.handle, mode);
2793 }
2794 public RESULT getMode(out MODE mode)
2795 {
2796 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetMode(this.handle, out mode);
2797 }
2798 public RESULT setCallback(CHANNELCONTROL_CALLBACK callback)
2799 {
2800 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetCallback(this.handle, callback);
2801 }
2802 public RESULT isPlaying(out bool isplaying)
2803 {
2804 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_IsPlaying(this.handle, out isplaying);
2805 }
2806
2807 // Note all 'set' functions alter a final matrix, this is why the only get function is getMixMatrix, to avoid other get functions returning incorrect/obsolete values.
2808 public RESULT setPan(float pan)
2809 {
2810 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetPan(this.handle, pan);
2811 }
2812 public RESULT setMixLevelsOutput(float frontleft, float frontright, float center, float lfe, float surroundleft, float surroundright, float backleft, float backright)
2813 {
2814 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetMixLevelsOutput(this.handle, frontleft, frontright, center, lfe, surroundleft, surroundright, backleft, backright);
2815 }
2816 public RESULT setMixLevelsInput(float[] levels, int numlevels)
2817 {
2818 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetMixLevelsInput(this.handle, levels, numlevels);
2819 }
2820 public RESULT setMixMatrix(float[] matrix, int outchannels, int inchannels, int inchannel_hop)
2821 {
2822 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetMixMatrix(this.handle, matrix, outchannels, inchannels, inchannel_hop);
2823 }
2824 public RESULT getMixMatrix(float[] matrix, out int outchannels, out int inchannels, int inchannel_hop)
2825 {
2826 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetMixMatrix(this.handle, matrix, out outchannels, out inchannels, inchannel_hop);
2827 }
2828
2829 // Clock based functionality.
2830 public RESULT getDSPClock(out ulong dspclock, out ulong parentclock)
2831 {
2832 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetDSPClock(this.handle, out dspclock, out parentclock);
2833 }
2834 public RESULT setDelay(ulong dspclock_start, ulong dspclock_end, bool stopchannels)
2835 {
2836 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetDelay(this.handle, dspclock_start, dspclock_end, stopchannels);
2837 }
2838 public RESULT getDelay(out ulong dspclock_start, out ulong dspclock_end)
2839 {
2840 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetDelay(this.handle, out dspclock_start, out dspclock_end, IntPtr.Zero);
2841 }
2842 public RESULT getDelay(out ulong dspclock_start, out ulong dspclock_end, out bool stopchannels)
2843 {
2844 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_GetDelay(this.handle, out dspclock_start, out dspclock_end, out stopchannels);
2845 }
2846 public RESULT addFadePoint(ulong dspclock, float volume)
2847 {
2848 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_AddFadePoint(this.handle, dspclock, volume);
2849 }
2850 public RESULT setFadePointRamp(ulong dspclock, float volume)
2851 {
2852 return FMOD5_ChannelGroup_SetFadePointRamp(this.handle, dspclock, volume);
2853 }

2859 {

2861 }

3126 #region wrapperinternal
3127
3128 public IntPtr handle;
3129
3130 public ChannelGroup(IntPtr ptr) { this.handle = ptr; }

3132 public void clearHandle() { this.handle = IntPtr.Zero; }
3133
3134 #endregion
3135 }
3136
3137 /*
3138 'SoundGroup' API
3139 */
3140 public struct SoundGroup
3141 {
3142 public RESULT release()
3143 {
3144 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_Release(this.handle);
3145 }
3146
3147 public RESULT getSystemObject(out System system)
3148 {
3149 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetSystemObject(this.handle, out system.handle);
3150 }
3151
3152 // SoundGroup control functions.
3153 public RESULT setMaxAudible(int maxaudible)
3154 {
3155 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_SetMaxAudible(this.handle, maxaudible);
3156 }
3157 public RESULT getMaxAudible(out int maxaudible)
3158 {
3159 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetMaxAudible(this.handle, out maxaudible);
3160 }
3161 public RESULT setMaxAudibleBehavior(SOUNDGROUP_BEHAVIOR behavior)
3162 {
3163 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_SetMaxAudibleBehavior(this.handle, behavior);
3164 }
3165 public RESULT getMaxAudibleBehavior(out SOUNDGROUP_BEHAVIOR behavior)
3166 {
3167 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetMaxAudibleBehavior(this.handle, out behavior);
3168 }
3169 public RESULT setMuteFadeSpeed(float speed)
3170 {
3171 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_SetMuteFadeSpeed(this.handle, speed);
3172 }
3173 public RESULT getMuteFadeSpeed(out float speed)
3174 {
3175 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetMuteFadeSpeed(this.handle, out speed);
3176 }
3177 public RESULT setVolume(float volume)
3178 {
3179 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_SetVolume(this.handle, volume);
3180 }
3181 public RESULT getVolume(out float volume)
3182 {
3183 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetVolume(this.handle, out volume);
3184 }
3185 public RESULT stop()
3186 {
3187 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_Stop(this.handle);
3188 }
3189
3190 // Information only functions.
3191 public RESULT getName(out string name, int namelen)
3192 {
3193 IntPtr stringMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(namelen);
3194
3195 RESULT result = FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetName(this.handle, stringMem, namelen);
3196 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
3197 {
3198 name = encoder.stringFromNative(stringMem);
3199 }
3200 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(stringMem);
3201
3202 return result;
3203 }
3204 public RESULT getNumSounds(out int numsounds)
3205 {
3206 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetNumSounds(this.handle, out numsounds);
3207 }
3208 public RESULT getSound(int index, out Sound sound)
3209 {
3210 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetSound(this.handle, index, out sound.handle);
3211 }
3212 public RESULT getNumPlaying(out int numplaying)
3213 {
3214 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetNumPlaying(this.handle, out numplaying);
3215 }
3216
3217 // Userdata set/get.
3218 public RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata)
3219 {
3220 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_SetUserData(this.handle, userdata);
3221 }
3222 public RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata)
3223 {
3224 return FMOD5_SoundGroup_GetUserData(this.handle, out userdata);
3225 }
3226

3265
3266 public IntPtr handle;
3267

3274
3275 /*
3276 'DSP' API
3277 */
3278 public struct DSP
3279 {
3280 public RESULT release()
3281 {
3282 return FMOD5_DSP_Release(this.handle);
3283 }
3284 public RESULT getSystemObject(out System system)
3285 {
3286 return FMOD5_DSP_GetSystemObject(this.handle, out system.handle);
3287 }
3288
3289 // Connection / disconnection / input and output enumeration.
3290 public RESULT addInput(DSP input)
3291 {
3292 return FMOD5_DSP_AddInput(this.handle, input.handle, IntPtr.Zero, DSPCONNECTION_TYPE.STANDARD);
3293 }
3294 public RESULT addInput(DSP input, out DSPConnection connection, DSPCONNECTION_TYPE type = DSPCONNECTION_TYPE.STANDARD)
3295 {
3296 return FMOD5_DSP_AddInput(this.handle, input.handle, out connection.handle, type);
3297 }
3298 public RESULT addInputPreallocated(DSP input, DSPConnection connection)
3299 {
3300 return FMOD5_DSP_AddInput(this.handle, input.handle, out connection.handle, DSPCONNECTION_TYPE.PREALLOCATED);
3301 }
3302 public RESULT disconnectFrom(DSP target, DSPConnection connection)
3303 {
3304 return FMOD5_DSP_DisconnectFrom(this.handle, target.handle, connection.handle);
3305 }
3306 public RESULT disconnectAll(bool inputs, bool outputs)
3307 {
3308 return FMOD5_DSP_DisconnectAll(this.handle, inputs, outputs);
3309 }
3310 public RESULT getNumInputs(out int numinputs)
3311 {
3312 return FMOD5_DSP_GetNumInputs(this.handle, out numinputs);
3313 }
3314 public RESULT getNumOutputs(out int numoutputs)
3315 {
3316 return FMOD5_DSP_GetNumOutputs(this.handle, out numoutputs);
3317 }
3318 public RESULT getInput(int index, out DSP input, out DSPConnection inputconnection)
3319 {
3320 return FMOD5_DSP_GetInput(this.handle, index, out input.handle, out inputconnection.handle);
3321 }
3322 public RESULT getOutput(int index, out DSP output, out DSPConnection outputconnection)
3323 {
3324 return FMOD5_DSP_GetOutput(this.handle, index, out output.handle, out outputconnection.handle);
3325 }
3326
3327 // DSP unit control.
3328 public RESULT setActive(bool active)
3329 {
3330 return FMOD5_DSP_SetActive(this.handle, active);
3331 }
3332 public RESULT getActive(out bool active)
3333 {
3334 return FMOD5_DSP_GetActive(this.handle, out active);
3335 }
3336 public RESULT setBypass(bool bypass)
3337 {
3338 return FMOD5_DSP_SetBypass(this.handle, bypass);
3339 }
3340 public RESULT getBypass(out bool bypass)
3341 {
3342 return FMOD5_DSP_GetBypass(this.handle, out bypass);
3343 }
3344 public RESULT setWetDryMix(float prewet, float postwet, float dry)
3345 {
3346 return FMOD5_DSP_SetWetDryMix(this.handle, prewet, postwet, dry);
3347 }
3348 public RESULT getWetDryMix(out float prewet, out float postwet, out float dry)
3349 {
3350 return FMOD5_DSP_GetWetDryMix(this.handle, out prewet, out postwet, out dry);
3351 }
3352 public RESULT setChannelFormat(CHANNELMASK channelmask, int numchannels, SPEAKERMODE source_speakermode)
3353 {
3354 return FMOD5_DSP_SetChannelFormat(this.handle, channelmask, numchannels, source_speakermode);
3355 }
3356 public RESULT getChannelFormat(out CHANNELMASK channelmask, out int numchannels, out SPEAKERMODE source_speakermode)
3357 {
3358 return FMOD5_DSP_GetChannelFormat(this.handle, out channelmask, out numchannels, out source_speakermode);
3359 }
3360 public RESULT getOutputChannelFormat(CHANNELMASK inmask, int inchannels, SPEAKERMODE inspeakermode, out CHANNELMASK outmask, out int outchannels, out SPEAKERMODE outspeakermode)
3361 {
3362 return FMOD5_DSP_GetOutputChannelFormat(this.handle, inmask, inchannels, inspeakermode, out outmask, out outchannels, out outspeakermode);
3363 }
3364 public RESULT reset()
3365 {
3366 return FMOD5_DSP_Reset(this.handle);
3367 }
3368 public RESULT setCallback(DSP_CALLBACK callback)
3369 {
3370 return FMOD5_DSP_SetCallback(this.handle, callback);
3371 }
3372
3373 // DSP parameter control.
3374 public RESULT setParameterFloat(int index, float value)
3375 {
3376 return FMOD5_DSP_SetParameterFloat(this.handle, index, value);
3377 }
3378 public RESULT setParameterInt(int index, int value)
3379 {
3380 return FMOD5_DSP_SetParameterInt(this.handle, index, value);
3381 }
3382 public RESULT setParameterBool(int index, bool value)
3383 {
3384 return FMOD5_DSP_SetParameterBool(this.handle, index, value);
3385 }
3386 public RESULT setParameterData(int index, byte[] data)
3387 {
3388 return FMOD5_DSP_SetParameterData(this.handle, index, data, data == null ? 0 : (uint)data.Length);
3389 }
3390 public RESULT getParameterFloat(int index, out float value)
3391 {
3392 return FMOD5_DSP_GetParameterFloat(this.handle, index, out value, IntPtr.Zero, 0);
3393 }
3394 public RESULT getParameterInt(int index, out int value)
3395 {
3396 return FMOD5_DSP_GetParameterInt(this.handle, index, out value, IntPtr.Zero, 0);
3397 }
3398 public RESULT getParameterBool(int index, out bool value)
3399 {
3400 return FMOD5_DSP_GetParameterBool(this.handle, index, out value, IntPtr.Zero, 0);
3401 }
3402 public RESULT getParameterData(int index, out IntPtr data, out uint length)
3403 {
3404 return FMOD5_DSP_GetParameterData(this.handle, index, out data, out length, IntPtr.Zero, 0);
3405 }
3406 public RESULT getNumParameters(out int numparams)
3407 {
3408 return FMOD5_DSP_GetNumParameters(this.handle, out numparams);
3409 }
3410 public RESULT getParameterInfo(int index, out DSP_PARAMETER_DESC desc)
3411 {
3412 IntPtr descPtr;
3413 RESULT result = FMOD5_DSP_GetParameterInfo(this.handle, index, out descPtr);
3414 desc = (DSP_PARAMETER_DESC)Marshal.PtrToStructure<DSP_PARAMETER_DESC>(descPtr);
3415 return result;
3416 }
3417 public RESULT getDataParameterIndex(int datatype, out int index)
3418 {
3419 return FMOD5_DSP_GetDataParameterIndex(this.handle, datatype, out index);
3420 }
3421 public RESULT showConfigDialog(IntPtr hwnd, bool show)
3422 {
3423 return FMOD5_DSP_ShowConfigDialog(this.handle, hwnd, show);
3424 }
3425
3426 // DSP attributes.
3427 public RESULT getInfo(out string name, out uint version, out int channels, out int configwidth, out int configheight)
3428 {
3429 IntPtr nameMem = Marshal.AllocHGlobal(32);
3430
3431 RESULT result = FMOD5_DSP_GetInfo(this.handle, nameMem, out version, out channels, out configwidth, out configheight);
3432 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
3433 {
3434 name = encoder.stringFromNative(nameMem);
3435 }
3436 Marshal.FreeHGlobal(nameMem);
3437 return result;
3438 }
3439 public RESULT getInfo(out uint version, out int channels, out int configwidth, out int configheight)
3440 {
3441 return FMOD5_DSP_GetInfo(this.handle, IntPtr.Zero, out version, out channels, out configwidth, out configheight); ;
3442 }
3443 public RESULT getType(out DSP_TYPE type)
3444 {
3445 return FMOD5_DSP_GetType(this.handle, out type);
3446 }
3447 public RESULT getIdle(out bool idle)
3448 {
3449 return FMOD5_DSP_GetIdle(this.handle, out idle);
3450 }
3451
3452 // Userdata set/get.
3453 public RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata)
3454 {
3455 return FMOD5_DSP_SetUserData(this.handle, userdata);
3456 }
3457 public RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata)
3458 {
3459 return FMOD5_DSP_GetUserData(this.handle, out userdata);
3460 }
3461
3462 // Metering.
3463 public RESULT setMeteringEnabled(bool inputEnabled, bool outputEnabled)
3464 {
3465 return FMOD5_DSP_SetMeteringEnabled(this.handle, inputEnabled, outputEnabled);
3466 }
3467 public RESULT getMeteringEnabled(out bool inputEnabled, out bool outputEnabled)
3468 {
3469 return FMOD5_DSP_GetMeteringEnabled(this.handle, out inputEnabled, out outputEnabled);
3470 }
3471
3472 public RESULT getMeteringInfo(IntPtr zero, out DSP_METERING_INFO outputInfo)
3473 {
3474 return FMOD5_DSP_GetMeteringInfo(this.handle, zero, out outputInfo);
3475 }
3476 public RESULT getMeteringInfo(out DSP_METERING_INFO inputInfo, IntPtr zero)
3477 {
3478 return FMOD5_DSP_GetMeteringInfo(this.handle, out inputInfo, zero);
3479 }
3480 public RESULT getMeteringInfo(out DSP_METERING_INFO inputInfo, out DSP_METERING_INFO outputInfo)
3481 {
3482 return FMOD5_DSP_GetMeteringInfo(this.handle, out inputInfo, out outputInfo);
3483 }
3484
3485 public RESULT getCPUUsage(out uint exclusive, out uint inclusive)
3486 {
3487 return FMOD5_DSP_GetCPUUsage(this.handle, out exclusive, out inclusive);
3488 }
3489
3490 #region importfunctions
3491 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3492 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_Release(IntPtr dsp);
3493 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3494 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetSystemObject(IntPtr dsp, out IntPtr system);
3495 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3496 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_AddInput(IntPtr dsp, IntPtr input, IntPtr zero, DSPCONNECTION_TYPE type);
3497 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3498 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_AddInput(IntPtr dsp, IntPtr input, out IntPtr connection, DSPCONNECTION_TYPE type);
3499 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3500 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_AddInputPreallocated(IntPtr dsp, IntPtr input, out IntPtr connection);
3501 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3502 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_DisconnectFrom(IntPtr dsp, IntPtr target, IntPtr connection);
3503 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3504 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_DisconnectAll(IntPtr dsp, bool inputs, bool outputs);
3505 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3506 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetNumInputs(IntPtr dsp, out int numinputs);
3507 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3508 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetNumOutputs(IntPtr dsp, out int numoutputs);
3509 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]

3511 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3512 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetOutput(IntPtr dsp, int index, out IntPtr output, out IntPtr outputconnection);
3513 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3514 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_SetActive(IntPtr dsp, bool active);
3515 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3516 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetActive(IntPtr dsp, out bool active);
3517 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3518 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_SetBypass(IntPtr dsp, bool bypass);
3519 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3520 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetBypass(IntPtr dsp, out bool bypass);

3523 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]

3527 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]

3529 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]

3531 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3532 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_Reset(IntPtr dsp);
3533 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3534 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_SetCallback(IntPtr dsp, DSP_CALLBACK callback);
3535 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3536 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_SetParameterFloat(IntPtr dsp, int index, float value);
3537 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3538 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_SetParameterInt(IntPtr dsp, int index, int value);
3539 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3540 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_SetParameterBool(IntPtr dsp, int index, bool value);
3541 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3542 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_SetParameterData(IntPtr dsp, int index, byte[] data, uint length);
3543 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3544 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetParameterFloat(IntPtr dsp, int index, out float value, IntPtr valuestr, int valuestrlen);
3545 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3546 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetParameterInt(IntPtr dsp, int index, out int value, IntPtr valuestr, int valuestrlen);
3547 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3548 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSP_GetParameterBool(IntPtr dsp, int index, out bool value, IntPtr valuestr, int valuestrlen);
3549 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]

3571 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]

3581 #endregion
3582
3583 #region wrapperinternal
3584
3585 public IntPtr handle;
3586
3587 public DSP(IntPtr ptr) { this.handle = ptr; }
3588 public bool hasHandle() { return this.handle != IntPtr.Zero; }
3589 public void clearHandle() { this.handle = IntPtr.Zero; }
3590
3591 #endregion
3592 }
3593
3594 /*
3595 'DSPConnection' API
3596 */
3597 public struct DSPConnection
3598 {
3599 public RESULT getInput(out DSP input)
3600 {
3601 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetInput(this.handle, out input.handle);
3602 }
3603 public RESULT getOutput(out DSP output)
3604 {
3605 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetOutput(this.handle, out output.handle);
3606 }
3607 public RESULT setMix(float volume)
3608 {
3609 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_SetMix(this.handle, volume);
3610 }
3611 public RESULT getMix(out float volume)
3612 {
3613 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetMix(this.handle, out volume);
3614 }
3615 public RESULT setMixMatrix(float[] matrix, int outchannels, int inchannels, int inchannel_hop = 0)
3616 {
3617 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_SetMixMatrix(this.handle, matrix, outchannels, inchannels, inchannel_hop);
3618 }
3619 public RESULT getMixMatrix(float[] matrix, out int outchannels, out int inchannels, int inchannel_hop = 0)
3620 {
3621 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetMixMatrix(this.handle, matrix, out outchannels, out inchannels, inchannel_hop);
3622 }
3623 public RESULT getType(out DSPCONNECTION_TYPE type)
3624 {
3625 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetType(this.handle, out type);
3626 }
3627
3628 // Userdata set/get.
3629 public RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata)
3630 {
3631 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_SetUserData(this.handle, userdata);
3632 }
3633 public RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata)
3634 {
3635 return FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetUserData(this.handle, out userdata);
3636 }
3637
3638 #region importfunctions
3639 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3640 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetInput(IntPtr dspconnection, out IntPtr input);
3641 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3642 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetOutput(IntPtr dspconnection, out IntPtr output);
3643 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3644 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_SetMix(IntPtr dspconnection, float volume);
3645 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3646 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetMix(IntPtr dspconnection, out float volume);
3647 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3648 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_SetMixMatrix(IntPtr dspconnection, float[] matrix, int outchannels, int inchannels, int inchannel_hop);
3649 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3650 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetMixMatrix(IntPtr dspconnection, float[] matrix, out int outchannels, out int inchannels, int inchannel_hop);
3651 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3652 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetType(IntPtr dspconnection, out DSPCONNECTION_TYPE type);
3653 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3654 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_SetUserData(IntPtr dspconnection, IntPtr userdata);
3655 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3656 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_DSPConnection_GetUserData(IntPtr dspconnection, out IntPtr userdata);
3657 #endregion
3658
3659 #region wrapperinternal
3660
3661 public IntPtr handle;
3662
3663 public DSPConnection(IntPtr ptr) { this.handle = ptr; }
3664 public bool hasHandle() { return this.handle != IntPtr.Zero; }
3665 public void clearHandle() { this.handle = IntPtr.Zero; }
3666
3667 #endregion
3668 }
3669
3670 /*
3671 'Geometry' API
3672 */
3673 public struct Geometry
3674 {
3675 public RESULT release()
3676 {
3677 return FMOD5_Geometry_Release(this.handle);
3678 }
3679
3680 // Polygon manipulation.
3681 public RESULT addPolygon(float directocclusion, float reverbocclusion, bool doublesided, int numvertices, VECTOR[] vertices, out int polygonindex)
3682 {
3683 return FMOD5_Geometry_AddPolygon(this.handle, directocclusion, reverbocclusion, doublesided, numvertices, vertices, out polygonindex);
3684 }
3685 public RESULT getNumPolygons(out int numpolygons)
3686 {
3687 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetNumPolygons(this.handle, out numpolygons);
3688 }
3689 public RESULT getMaxPolygons(out int maxpolygons, out int maxvertices)
3690 {
3691 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetMaxPolygons(this.handle, out maxpolygons, out maxvertices);
3692 }
3693 public RESULT getPolygonNumVertices(int index, out int numvertices)
3694 {
3695 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetPolygonNumVertices(this.handle, index, out numvertices);
3696 }
3697 public RESULT setPolygonVertex(int index, int vertexindex, ref VECTOR vertex)
3698 {
3699 return FMOD5_Geometry_SetPolygonVertex(this.handle, index, vertexindex, ref vertex);
3700 }
3701 public RESULT getPolygonVertex(int index, int vertexindex, out VECTOR vertex)
3702 {
3703 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetPolygonVertex(this.handle, index, vertexindex, out vertex);
3704 }
3705 public RESULT setPolygonAttributes(int index, float directocclusion, float reverbocclusion, bool doublesided)
3706 {
3707 return FMOD5_Geometry_SetPolygonAttributes(this.handle, index, directocclusion, reverbocclusion, doublesided);
3708 }
3709 public RESULT getPolygonAttributes(int index, out float directocclusion, out float reverbocclusion, out bool doublesided)
3710 {
3711 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetPolygonAttributes(this.handle, index, out directocclusion, out reverbocclusion, out doublesided);
3712 }
3713
3714 // Object manipulation.
3715 public RESULT setActive(bool active)
3716 {
3717 return FMOD5_Geometry_SetActive(this.handle, active);
3718 }
3719 public RESULT getActive(out bool active)
3720 {
3721 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetActive(this.handle, out active);
3722 }
3723 public RESULT setRotation(ref VECTOR forward, ref VECTOR up)
3724 {
3725 return FMOD5_Geometry_SetRotation(this.handle, ref forward, ref up);
3726 }
3727 public RESULT getRotation(out VECTOR forward, out VECTOR up)
3728 {
3729 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetRotation(this.handle, out forward, out up);
3730 }
3731 public RESULT setPosition(ref VECTOR position)
3732 {
3733 return FMOD5_Geometry_SetPosition(this.handle, ref position);
3734 }
3735 public RESULT getPosition(out VECTOR position)
3736 {
3737 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetPosition(this.handle, out position);
3738 }
3739 public RESULT setScale(ref VECTOR scale)
3740 {
3741 return FMOD5_Geometry_SetScale(this.handle, ref scale);
3742 }
3743 public RESULT getScale(out VECTOR scale)
3744 {
3745 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetScale(this.handle, out scale);
3746 }
3747 public RESULT save(IntPtr data, out int datasize)
3748 {
3749 return FMOD5_Geometry_Save(this.handle, data, out datasize);
3750 }
3751
3752 // Userdata set/get.
3753 public RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata)
3754 {
3755 return FMOD5_Geometry_SetUserData(this.handle, userdata);
3756 }
3757 public RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata)
3758 {
3759 return FMOD5_Geometry_GetUserData(this.handle, out userdata);
3760 }
3761
3762 #region importfunctions
3763 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3764 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_Release(IntPtr geometry);
3765 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3766 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_AddPolygon(IntPtr geometry, float directocclusion, float reverbocclusion, bool doublesided, int numvertices, VECTOR[] vertices, out int polygonindex);
3767 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3768 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetNumPolygons(IntPtr geometry, out int numpolygons);
3769 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3770 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetMaxPolygons(IntPtr geometry, out int maxpolygons, out int maxvertices);
3771 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3772 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetPolygonNumVertices(IntPtr geometry, int index, out int numvertices);
3773 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3774 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_SetPolygonVertex(IntPtr geometry, int index, int vertexindex, ref VECTOR vertex);
3775 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3776 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetPolygonVertex(IntPtr geometry, int index, int vertexindex, out VECTOR vertex);
3777 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]

3779 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3780 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetPolygonAttributes(IntPtr geometry, int index, out float directocclusion, out float reverbocclusion, out bool doublesided);
3781 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3782 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_SetActive(IntPtr geometry, bool active);
3783 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3784 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetActive(IntPtr geometry, out bool active);
3785 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3786 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_SetRotation(IntPtr geometry, ref VECTOR forward, ref VECTOR up);
3787 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3788 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetRotation(IntPtr geometry, out VECTOR forward, out VECTOR up);
3789 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3790 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_SetPosition(IntPtr geometry, ref VECTOR position);
3791 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3792 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetPosition(IntPtr geometry, out VECTOR position);
3793 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3794 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_SetScale(IntPtr geometry, ref VECTOR scale);
3795 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3796 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetScale(IntPtr geometry, out VECTOR scale);
3797 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3798 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_Save(IntPtr geometry, IntPtr data, out int datasize);
3799 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3800 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_SetUserData(IntPtr geometry, IntPtr userdata);
3801 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3802 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Geometry_GetUserData(IntPtr geometry, out IntPtr userdata);
3803 #endregion
3804
3805 #region wrapperinternal
3806
3807 public IntPtr handle;
3808
3809 public Geometry(IntPtr ptr) { this.handle = ptr; }
3810 public bool hasHandle() { return this.handle != IntPtr.Zero; }
3811 public void clearHandle() { this.handle = IntPtr.Zero; }
3812
3813 #endregion
3814 }
3815
3816 /*
3817 'Reverb3D' API
3818 */
3819 public struct Reverb3D
3820 {
3821 public RESULT release()
3822 {
3823 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_Release(this.handle);
3824 }
3825
3826 // Reverb manipulation.
3827 public RESULT set3DAttributes(ref VECTOR position, float mindistance, float maxdistance)
3828 {
3829 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_Set3DAttributes(this.handle, ref position, mindistance, maxdistance);
3830 }
3831 public RESULT get3DAttributes(ref VECTOR position, ref float mindistance, ref float maxdistance)
3832 {
3833 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_Get3DAttributes(this.handle, ref position, ref mindistance, ref maxdistance);
3834 }
3835 public RESULT setProperties(ref REVERB_PROPERTIES properties)
3836 {
3837 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_SetProperties(this.handle, ref properties);
3838 }
3839 public RESULT getProperties(ref REVERB_PROPERTIES properties)
3840 {
3841 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_GetProperties(this.handle, ref properties);
3842 }
3843 public RESULT setActive(bool active)
3844 {
3845 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_SetActive(this.handle, active);
3846 }
3847 public RESULT getActive(out bool active)
3848 {
3849 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_GetActive(this.handle, out active);
3850 }
3851
3852 // Userdata set/get.
3853 public RESULT setUserData(IntPtr userdata)
3854 {
3855 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_SetUserData(this.handle, userdata);
3856 }
3857 public RESULT getUserData(out IntPtr userdata)
3858 {
3859 return FMOD5_Reverb3D_GetUserData(this.handle, out userdata);
3860 }
3861
3862 #region importfunctions
3863 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3864 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_Release(IntPtr reverb3d);
3865 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3866 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_Set3DAttributes(IntPtr reverb3d, ref VECTOR position, float mindistance, float maxdistance);
3867 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3868 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_Get3DAttributes(IntPtr reverb3d, ref VECTOR position, ref float mindistance, ref float maxdistance);
3869 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3870 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_SetProperties(IntPtr reverb3d, ref REVERB_PROPERTIES properties);
3871 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3872 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_GetProperties(IntPtr reverb3d, ref REVERB_PROPERTIES properties);
3873 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3874 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_SetActive(IntPtr reverb3d, bool active);
3875 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3876 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_GetActive(IntPtr reverb3d, out bool active);
3877 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3878 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_SetUserData(IntPtr reverb3d, IntPtr userdata);
3879 [DllImport(VERSION.dll)]
3880 private static extern RESULT FMOD5_Reverb3D_GetUserData(IntPtr reverb3d, out IntPtr userdata);
3881 #endregion
3882
3883 #region wrapperinternal
3884
3885 public IntPtr handle;
3886
3887 public Reverb3D(IntPtr ptr) { this.handle = ptr; }
3888 public bool hasHandle() { return this.handle != IntPtr.Zero; }
3889 public void clearHandle() { this.handle = IntPtr.Zero; }
3890
3891 #endregion
3892 }
3893
3894 #region Helper Functions
3895 [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)]
3896 public struct StringWrapper
3897 {
3898 IntPtr nativeUtf8Ptr;
3899
3900 public StringWrapper(IntPtr ptr)
3901 {
3902 nativeUtf8Ptr = ptr;
3903 }
3904
3905 public static implicit operator string(StringWrapper fstring)
3906 {
3907 using (StringHelper.ThreadSafeEncoding encoder = StringHelper.GetFreeHelper())
3908 {
3909 return encoder.stringFromNative(fstring.nativeUtf8Ptr);
3910 }
3911 }
3912
3913 public bool StartsWith(byte[] prefix)
3914 {
3915 if (nativeUtf8Ptr == IntPtr.Zero)
3916 {
3917 return false;
3918 }
3919
3920 for (int i = 0; i < prefix.Length; i++)
3921 {
3922 if (Marshal.ReadByte(nativeUtf8Ptr, i) != prefix[i])
3923 {
3924 return false;
3925 }
3926 }
3927
3928 return true;
3929 }
3930
3931 public bool Equals(byte[] comparison)
3932 {
3933 if (nativeUtf8Ptr == IntPtr.Zero)
3934 {
3935 return false;
3936 }
3937
3938 for (int i = 0; i < comparison.Length; i++)
3939 {
3940 if (Marshal.ReadByte(nativeUtf8Ptr, i) != comparison[i])
3941 {
3942 return false;
3943 }
3944 }
3945
3946 if (Marshal.ReadByte(nativeUtf8Ptr, comparison.Length) != 0)
3947 {
3948 return false;
3949 }
3950
3951 return true;
3952 }
3953 }
3954
3955 static class StringHelper
3956 {
3957 public class ThreadSafeEncoding : IDisposable
3958 {
3959 UTF8Encoding encoding = new UTF8Encoding();
3960 byte[] encodedBuffer = new byte[128];
3961 char[] decodedBuffer = new char[128];
3962 bool inUse;
3963 GCHandle gcHandle;
3964
3965 public bool InUse() { return inUse; }
3966 public void SetInUse() { inUse = true; }
3967
3968 private static int roundUpPowerTwo(int number)
3969 {
3970 int newNumber = 1;
3971 while (newNumber <= number)
3972 {
3973 newNumber *= 2;
3974 }
3975
3976 return newNumber;
3977 }
3978
3979 public byte[] byteFromStringUTF8(string s)
3980 {
3981 if (s == null)
3982 {
3983 return null;
3984 }
3985
3986 int maximumLength = encoding.GetMaxByteCount(s.Length) + 1; // +1 for null terminator
3987 if (maximumLength > encodedBuffer.Length)
3988 {
3989 int encodedLength = encoding.GetByteCount(s) + 1; // +1 for null terminator
3990 if (encodedLength > encodedBuffer.Length)
3991 {
3992 encodedBuffer = new byte[roundUpPowerTwo(encodedLength)];
3993 }
3994 }
3995
3996 int byteCount = encoding.GetBytes(s, 0, s.Length, encodedBuffer, 0);
3997 encodedBuffer[byteCount] = 0; // Apply null terminator
3998
3999 return encodedBuffer;
4000 }
4001
4002 public IntPtr intptrFromStringUTF8(string s)
4003 {
4004 if (s == null)
4005 {
4006 return IntPtr.Zero;
4007 }
4008
4009 gcHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(byteFromStringUTF8(s), GCHandleType.Pinned);
4010 return gcHandle.AddrOfPinnedObject();
4011 }
4012
4013 public string stringFromNative(IntPtr nativePtr)
4014 {
4015 if (nativePtr == IntPtr.Zero)
4016 {
4017 return "";
4018 }
4019
4020 int nativeLen = 0;
4021 while (Marshal.ReadByte(nativePtr, nativeLen) != 0)
4022 {
4023 nativeLen++;
4024 }
4025
4026 if (nativeLen == 0)
4027 {
4028 return "";
4029 }
4030
4031 if (nativeLen > encodedBuffer.Length)
4032 {
4033 encodedBuffer = new byte[roundUpPowerTwo(nativeLen)];
4034 }
4035
4036 Marshal.Copy(nativePtr, encodedBuffer, 0, nativeLen);
4037
4038 int maximumLength = encoding.GetMaxCharCount(nativeLen);
4039 if (maximumLength > decodedBuffer.Length)
4040 {
4041 int decodedLength = encoding.GetCharCount(encodedBuffer, 0, nativeLen);
4042 if (decodedLength > decodedBuffer.Length)
4043 {
4044 decodedBuffer = new char[roundUpPowerTwo(decodedLength)];
4045 }
4046 }
4047
4048 int charCount = encoding.GetChars(encodedBuffer, 0, nativeLen, decodedBuffer, 0);
4049
4050 return new String(decodedBuffer, 0, charCount);
4051 }
4052
4053 public void Dispose()
4054 {
4055 if (gcHandle.IsAllocated)
4056 {
4057 gcHandle.Free();
4058 }
4059 lock (encoders)
4060 {
4061 inUse = false;
4062 }
4063 GC.SuppressFinalize(this);
4064 }
4065 }
4066
4067 static List<ThreadSafeEncoding> encoders = new List<ThreadSafeEncoding>(1);
4068
4069 public static ThreadSafeEncoding GetFreeHelper()
4070 {
4071 lock (encoders)
4072 {
4073 ThreadSafeEncoding helper = null;
4074 // Search for not in use helper
4075 for (int i = 0; i < encoders.Count; i++)
4076 {
4077 if (!encoders[i].InUse())
4078 {
4079 helper = encoders[i];
4080 break;
4081 }
4082 }
4083 // Otherwise create another helper
4084 if (helper == null)
4085 {
4086 helper = new ThreadSafeEncoding();
4087 encoders.Add(helper);
4088 }
4089 helper.SetInUse();
4090 return helper;
4091 }
4092 }
4093 }
4094
4095 #endregion
4096}
